centers.english: to build something

examples.english: Are they going to build on this land?
examples.chinese: 他们打算在这块地上建房子吗？

examples.english: His ambition is to build his own house.
examples.chinese: 他的愿望是要建一幢自己的房子。

examples.english: The cost of building the new football stadium was over $40 million.
examples.chinese: 建造这座新足球场的费用超过4,000万美元。

examples.english: The road was originally built by the Romans.
examples.chinese: 那条道路最初是罗马人修建的。

examples.english: Only about 3% of houses in the US are built of concrete.
examples.chinese: 美国的房屋只有大约3%是用水泥造的。

examples.english: Builders say that new home construction is slowing down.
examples.chinese: 建筑商说新屋的建造工程进度正在放缓。

examples.english: They're planning to tear down these apartments and put up an office building.
examples.chinese: 他们正计划拆除这些公寓楼，建一幢办公大楼。

examples.english: Isobel and Peter have put a stone wall up along the side of the garden.
examples.chinese: 伊索贝尔和彼得沿着花园边缘筑起了一道石墙。

examples.english: The city council has plans for constructing two new schools and a hospital.
examples.chinese: 市政委员会计划兴建两所新学校和一座医院。

examples.english: This elegant two-storey stone building was constructed in 1889.
examples.chinese: 这幢两层高的漂亮石屋建于1889年。

examples.english: New freeway ramps are being constructed in San Bruno.
examples.chinese: 新的高速公路岔道正在圣布鲁诺建造。

examples.english: It seems like new beachfront hotels are going up every week.
examples.chinese: 似乎每星期都有新的海边酒店在建起来。

examples.english: Whenever a new mall goes up, I ask myself how many of these things we need.
examples.chinese: 每当有新的购物中心建成，我都会自问这种东西有多少是我们需要的。

examples.english: The first lighthouse was erected on the island in 1912.
examples.chinese: 1912年岛上竖起了第一座灯塔。

examples.english: The group hopes to erect a statue of Fleming next year.
examples.chinese: 该组织希望明年建一座弗莱明纪念像。

centers.english: the process of building houses, roads etc
centers.chinese: 建造房屋、道路等的过程

examples.english: The firm deals mainly in road construction.
examples.chinese: 这家公司主要从事道路建筑。

examples.english: Construction on the tunnel will begin in April.
examples.chinese: 隧道将于4月份动工建造。

examples.english: Construction of the dam is nearly complete.
examples.chinese: 筑坝工程即将竣工。

examples.english: About 3,000 housing units are under construction in the city.
examples.chinese: 市内约有3,000个住屋单位在建筑之中。

examples.english: The construction industry has been severely affected by the recession.
examples.chinese: 建筑业受到了经济衰退的严重影响。

examples.english: There has been an increase in new-home building in recent months.
examples.chinese: 近几个月来新屋建造量有所增加。

examples.english: It was the invention of pre-stressed concrete that really transformed building techniques.
examples.chinese: 是预应力混凝土的发明使建筑技术得以彻底改变。

examples.english: Thousands of workers in the building industry will lose their jobs as a result of cutbacks.
examples.chinese: 由于裁员，建筑业中将有数以千计的工人失业。

centers.english: the design of buildings

examples.english: We spent most of our time in Barcelona just looking at the architecture.
examples.chinese: 我们大部分时间都只是在巴塞罗那市内观赏建筑。

examples.english: City Hall is a fine example of Gothic architecture.
examples.chinese: 市政厅是哥特式建筑的范例。

examples.english: She's studying architecture at college.
examples.chinese: 她在大学里读建筑学。

examples.english: The building has won several awards for its architectural design.
examples.chinese: 该建筑物获得了多项建筑设计奖。

examples.english: St Paul's Cathedral was designed by the famous architect, Sir Christopher Wren.
examples.chinese: 圣保罗大教堂是由著名建筑师克里斯托弗·雷恩爵士设计的。

centers.english: a building or group of buildings
centers.chinese: 一幢建筑物或一群建筑物

examples.english: Brewer Hall is a red-brick building with white trim.
examples.chinese: 布鲁尔大厅是一幢红砖配以白色饰边的建筑。

examples.english: The whole building shook when a train went past.
examples.chinese: 火车经过时，整幢楼都会颤动。

examples.english: There's a plan to convert the farm buildings into private apartments.
examples.chinese: 有人计划将农场建筑物改建成私人公寓。

examples.english: The house at Number 14 was replaced by a block of flats.
examples.chinese: 14号那幢房子被一栋公寓楼取代了。

examples.english: There's another new office block going up behind the station.
examples.chinese: 车站后面正兴建另一幢新的办公大楼。

examples.english: His studios are on the tenth floor of an office block overlooking the river.
examples.chinese: 他的工作室在一幢可远眺河流的办公大楼的10层。

examples.english: To the east is a landscape of concrete tower blocks.
examples.chinese: 东边是一大片水泥高层建筑物。

examples.english: The new development at the edge of town is aimed at first-time buyers.
examples.chinese: 市镇边缘的新建住宅区是为首次购房者建造的。

examples.english: The former cropland has been turned into housing developments and shopping malls.
examples.chinese: 过去的农田已被改变为住宅区和购物商场。

examples.english: The station building was a high wooden structure with a curved roof.
examples.chinese: 车站大楼是一幢高高的木结构建筑物，有着弧形的屋顶。

examples.english: The stone arch is one of the town's oldest existing structures.
examples.chinese: 石拱门是该镇上现存的最古老的建筑之一。

centers.english: different types of house

examples.english: Our house is the one with the red door.
examples.chinese: 我们的房子是红色门的那一幢。

examples.english: I went over to Barbara's house after school.
examples.chinese: 放学后我去了芭芭拉家。

examples.english: The street was lined with identical red-brick houses.
examples.chinese: 这条街道的两旁都是一模一样的红砖房。

examples.english: a detached house in Surrey
examples.chinese: 萨里一幢独立式的房子

examples.english: a three-bedroom semi-detached house
examples.chinese: 一幢有三间卧室的半独立式房子

examples.english: The street ran between rows of dingy terraced houses.
examples.chinese: 街道两旁是肮脏的连排房屋。

examples.english: She lives in a charming cottage deep in the Kent countryside.
examples.chinese: 她住在肯特郡郊外深处的一所美丽的村舍里。

examples.english: a row of thatched cottages in a rural village
examples.chinese: 农村里的一排茅舍

examples.english: He and his wife lived in a modern bungalow on the outskirts of the city.
examples.chinese: 他和妻子住在市郊一幢新式的平房里。

examples.english: Old buildings were knocked down, and new apartments and townhouses built.
examples.chinese: 旧的房子拆了，建起了新的公寓和联体住宅。

examples.english: a magnificent mansion set in 2000 acres of countryside
examples.chinese: 坐落于一片2，000英亩乡间土地上的一所豪宅

examples.english: an eleven-bedroom mansion in Hancock Park
examples.chinese: 汉考克公园里一幢有11间卧室的大房子

centers.english: different types of apartment

examples.english: They went back to her apartment for a cup of coffee.
examples.chinese: 他们回到她的公寓里喝了杯咖啡。

examples.english: There was no point in paying rent for an empty apartment.
examples.chinese: 花钱租一套空无一物的公寓没什么意思。

examples.english: Small apartment buildings filled with families line the street.
examples.chinese: 沿街是一幢幢小型的公寓楼，楼里住满了人家。

examples.english: High-rise apartment buildings have gone up where once there was open land.
examples.chinese: 曾经是一片空地的地方建起了一栋栋高耸的公寓大楼。

examples.english: Stella and Keith moved into a cold, damp flat together.
examples.chinese: 斯特拉和基思一同搬进了一套阴冷潮湿的公寓房里。

examples.english: a group of students in a shared flat
examples.chinese: 合住一套公寓房的一群学生

examples.english: Lisa lives on the nineteenth floor of a block of flats in London.
examples.chinese: 莉萨住在伦敦一幢公寓大楼的19楼。

examples.english: He lives in a condo in San Jose.
examples.chinese: 他住在圣何塞的一套公寓房里。

examples.english: They rent out their condominium to skiers during the winter.
examples.chinese: 到了冬天，他们就把自己的那套公寓房出租给滑雪者使用。

centers.english: a place for someone to live

examples.english: Most of the housing in the area is sub-standard and nothing is being done to improve it.
examples.chinese: 该地区大多数住房都质量低劣，也没人采取什么措施去加以改善。

examples.english: The council is making a great effort to provide cheap housing and more public facilities.
examples.chinese: 市政会正在尽很大努力提供廉价的住房和更多的公共设施。

examples.english: The holiday costs about £400 for a week's accommodation and flights.
examples.chinese: 这次度假大约要花400英镑，包括一星期的住宿和机票。

examples.english: I've been looking in the newspapers for student accommodation but it's all so expensive.
examples.chinese: 我在报纸上寻找供学生住宿的地方，但都太贵了。

examples.english: They want to build forty luxury homes on a disused railway site.
examples.chinese: 他们想在弃置不用的铁路旧址上建造40幢豪华住宅。

examples.english: Between 1945 and 1970 the government built 110,000 new homes for low-paid workers.
examples.chinese: 1945年至1970年间，政府为低收入工人建造了11万套新居。

examples.english: I'll stay at my grandmother's at first, until I find somewhere to live.
examples.chinese: 我会先住在我祖母家里，直至我找到地方住。

examples.english: Students looking for somewhere to live can go the university accommodation service.
examples.chinese: 寻找住处的学生可以找大学里的住宿服务部门帮忙。

examples.english: It doesn't matter what kind of place it is, at least you'll have a roof over your head.
examples.chinese: 什么样的地方无所谓，起码你有了一个栖身之处。

examples.english: It's hard to be cheerful when you haven't even got a roof over your head.
examples.chinese: 连个安身之处都没有的话，哪里还能高兴得起来。

examples.english: Jane has her own house on a neat housing estate in the south-east.
examples.chinese: 简在东南面一个环境整洁的住宅区里有自己的房子。

examples.english: They live in a block of flats on a bleak council estate.
examples.chinese: 他们住在一个荒凉的统建住房小区的一幢公寓楼里。

examples.english: Under this proposal, Federal money will no longer go to public housing projects but will go instead directly to the people.
examples.chinese: 根据这一提议，联邦政府的钱将不再用于公共住宅项目，而是直接分到人们的手里。

examples.english: Chicago's Cabrini Green housing project
examples.chinese: 芝加哥的卡布里尼绿园住宅区

examples.english: She says she wants something better for her kids than what she had in the projects.
examples.chinese: 她说她想要给孩子们更好的，而不是她在廉租房里的那些。

examples.english: New developments are springing up all around the town.
examples.chinese: 这座城镇各处都出现了新的住宅小区。

centers.english: a toilet/rest room

examples.english: ‘Where's the toilet?’ ‘Downstairs on the right.’
examples.chinese: “洗手间在哪儿？”“在楼下的右面。”

examples.english: There's a huge queue in the ladies’ toilets.
examples.chinese: 女厕所外排起了长队。

examples.english: Pat refuses to use the public toilets in this country because they are always so dirty.
examples.chinese: 帕特在这个国家拒绝使用公共厕所，因为那里总是非常脏。

examples.english: The bathroom is next to Jack's room.
examples.chinese: 洗手间在杰克房间的旁边。

examples.english: ‘Can I use your bathroom?’ ‘Sure, go ahead.’
examples.chinese: “我可以用一下你的洗手间吗？”“当然可以，尽管用。〕”

examples.english: Where's the loo?
examples.chinese: 厕所在哪里？

examples.english: Tony's in the john. He'll be back in a minute.
examples.chinese: 托尼上厕所了，他一会儿就回来。

examples.english: It's a good pub, but the bogs are terrible!
examples.chinese: 那个小酒馆不错，不过那里的厕所太糟糕了！

examples.english: Do you have restrooms here?
examples.chinese: 你们这里有盥洗室吗？

examples.english: There's no paper in the washroom.
examples.chinese: 洗手间里没卫生纸了。

examples.english: Can you tell me where the men's room is please?
examples.chinese: 你能告诉我男厕所在哪里吗?

examples.english: ‘Where's Kevin?’ ‘He went to the gents.’
examples.chinese: “凯文在哪里？”“他去男厕所了。”

examples.english: Wait for me outside. I'm going to the ladies.
examples.chinese: 在外面等我，我要去一下女厕所。

examples.english: The ladies’ room is just around the corner.
examples.chinese: 女厕所就在拐弯处。

examples.english: Even the lavatory was luxurious, with a marble interior and soft, white hand towels.
examples.chinese: 甚至连洗手间都是豪华型的，有大理石的内部装饰和柔软雪白的手巾。

examples.english: The public lavatories are situated on the other side of the beach.
examples.chinese: 公共厕所在海滩的另一边。

examples.english: All our holiday apartments have a double bedroom, small kitchen, bathroom, and WC.
examples.chinese: 我们所有的度假套间都有双人卧室、小厨房、浴室和盥洗室。

centers.english: to use the toilet

examples.english: Mummy! I want to go to the toilet.
examples.chinese: 妈妈，我要上厕所。

examples.english: Hang on a minute - I'm just going to the loo.
examples.chinese: 等一会，我正好要去上厕所。

examples.english: I thought you went to the bathroom before we left.
examples.chinese: 我以为你在我们离开前已经去过厕所了。

examples.english: You get the drinks in - I'll just go and powder my nose.
examples.chinese: 你把饮料拿进来，我去补一下妆。

centers.english: where someone lives

examples.english: People like to feel secure in their own homes.
examples.chinese: 人们喜欢自己的家里有安全感。

examples.english: Buying your first home is a very important step.
examples.chinese: 首次购买住房是非常重要的一步。

examples.english: To raise the extra money they had to sell the family home.
examples.chinese: 为了多凑点钱，他们不得不把世代居住的房子卖了。

examples.english: You need to maintain a good balance between your home life and career.
examples.chinese: 你需要把家庭生活和事业兼顾好。

examples.english: OK. I'll see you at Helen's at eight o'clock.
examples.chinese: 好，我8点在海伦家与你碰头。

examples.english: We were at the Thompsons’ last Saturday for dinner.
examples.chinese: 上个星期六，我们在汤普森家吃晚饭。

examples.english: You've never been to my sister's, have you?
examples.chinese: 你从没去过我妹妹家，是吗？

examples.english: Terry's just bought himself a place over in Newgate, overlooking the harbour.
examples.chinese: 特里刚在纽盖特买了房子，可以看到海港。

examples.english: Why don't you come around to our place for a drink on Saturday?
examples.chinese: 星期六来我们家喝一杯吧。

examples.english: Your place is too small for a party. Let's have it at mine.
examples.chinese: 你的住处举行聚会太小了，还是在我家举行吧。

examples.english: 10 Downing Street is the British Prime Minister's official residence.
examples.chinese: 唐宁街十号是英国首相的官邸。

examples.english: We first met at a cocktail party at the residence of the Russian ambassador.
examples.chinese: 我们在俄罗斯大使官邸举办的一个鸡尾酒会上初次会面。

examples.english: What's your address and telephone number?
examples.chinese: 你的地址和电话号码是什么?

examples.english: Notify your credit card company of any change of address.
examples.chinese: 地址若有变更，请通知你的信用卡公司。

examples.english: I checked my address book for Rick's house number.
examples.chinese: 我在通讯录上查里克家的电话号码。

centers.english: to be in your home

examples.english: I'll be at home tonight if you want to call me.
examples.chinese: 如果你想打电话给我，今天晚上我在家里。

examples.english: We're just going to stay at home rather than go away anywhere.
examples.chinese: 我们就打算留在家里，哪里也不去。

examples.english: Jim's never home Friday nights. You should know that.
examples.chinese: 吉姆星期五晚上从不在家，你应该知道的。

examples.english: It was raining, so I stayed home.
examples.chinese: 天在下雨，所以我留在家里。

examples.english: The two-year-old girl had been left home alone.
examples.chinese: 这个两岁的小女孩被单独留在了家里。

examples.english: ‘Hello, Mrs Jones. Is Sally in, please?’
examples.chinese: “你好，琼斯太太。请问萨莉在家吗？”

examples.english: We went to see Phil and Tony but there was nobody in.
examples.chinese: 我们去看望菲尔和托尼，但家里没人。!

examples.english: No, Gerry won't be in until after eight o'clock.
examples.chinese: 不，格里8点后才会回家。

centers.english: happening or doing something in someone's home
centers.chinese: 某人家里发生某事，或在某人家中做某事

examples.english: The good thing about my job is that I can often work at home.
examples.chinese: 我的工作好处在于我常能在家工作。

examples.english: Earlier in the century it was normal for women to have their babies at home.
examples.chinese: 本世纪初期，女人在家生孩子是很正常的事。

examples.english: Darren still lives at home with his parents.
examples.chinese: 达伦仍和父母亲一起住在家里。

examples.english: She likes to keep her domestic life quite separate from her work.
examples.chinese: 她喜欢把家庭生活和工作完全分开。

examples.english: The women had all experienced some form of domestic violence.
examples.chinese: 这些妇女全都遭遇过某种形式的家庭暴力。

centers.english: words for describing something that is used in people's homes
centers.chinese: 描述人们在家中使用的东西的词语

examples.english: The company has decided to expand in the home computer market.
examples.chinese: 该公司已决定拓展家用电脑市场。

examples.english: Home furnishings are on the second floor next to the toy department.
examples.chinese: 家具在二楼玩具部的旁边。

examples.english: The gas is used for domestic heating and cooking.
examples.chinese: 煤气用于家庭取暖和煮食。

examples.english: The store sells a wide range of domestic appliances.
examples.chinese: 这家商店经销多种家用设备。

centers.english: to or towards your home

examples.english: He cleans the offices after all the workers have gone home.
examples.chinese: 所有的工人回家后，他便打扫办公室。

examples.english: Come straight home after the theatre, won't you?
examples.chinese: 看完戏后直接回家，好吗？

examples.english: You can take the laptop home with you if you like.
examples.chinese: 你愿意的话可以把手提电脑带回家。

centers.english: to not be in your home

examples.english: ‘Can I speak to Frank?’ ‘I'm sorry he's out right now.’
examples.chinese: “请找弗兰克好吗？”“对不起，现在他不在家。”

examples.english: While they were out, someone broke in and stole their TV and VCR.
examples.chinese: 他们不在家的时候，有人闯进屋里偷走了电视机和录像机。

examples.english: Who's going to look after your cats while you're away?
examples.chinese: 你不在家时谁照顾你的猫呢？

examples.english: Jack worked as a pilot and was often away from home.
examples.chinese: 杰克是飞行员，经常不在家。

centers.english: to provide someone with a place to live

examples.english: The refugees have been fed, clothed and housed by welfare organizations around the world.
examples.chinese: 这些难民由世界各地的福利机构提供食物、衣服和住处。

examples.english: Once you have been accepted at the university they promise to accommodate you in a dormitory.
examples.chinese: 一经录取，校方就会承诺向你提供宿舍。

examples.english: Migrant workers are to be accommodated near the place where they work.
examples.chinese: 要给流动工人在他们工作地点附近的地方提供住宿。

centers.english: to have no home

expressions.text: not have anywhere to live/have nowhere to live

examples.english: She was in a strange city, with no job and without anywhere to live.
examples.chinese: 她在一个人地生疏的城市里，没有工作，也没有落脚的地方。

examples.english: He's staying at my house because he has nowhere to live right now.
examples.chinese: 他住在我家，因为他现在没有地方可以住。

examples.english: The possibility that he might become homeless frightened him.
examples.chinese: 他有可能会变得无家可归，这使他很害怕。

examples.english: There is a system of shelters for homeless people.
examples.chinese: 对于无家可归者，有一套收容的制度。

examples.english: The earthquake left thousands of people homeless.
examples.chinese: 地震造成成千上万的人无家可归。

examples.english: The committee criticized the government's new policy on homelessness.
examples.chinese: 委员会批评了政府在无家可归问题上的新政策。

examples.english: As many as 250,000 children are homeless and on the streets.
examples.chinese: 多达25万儿童无家可归，流落街头。

examples.english: He ran away from home and lived rough on the streets until the police helped him get into a hostel.
examples.chinese: 他离家出走，露宿街头，直到警察把他送进一家收容所。

centers.english: people who have no home to live in

examples.english: We distribute food and blankets to the homeless on the streets of London.
examples.chinese: 我们把食品和毛毯分发给伦敦街头的无家可归者。

examples.english: There aren't enough places in short-stay hostels, so the homeless are reduced to sleeping in cardboard boxes.
examples.chinese: 供临时居住的收容所里床位不够，所以无家可归的人只得睡在硬纸板箱里。

examples.english: Empty houses attract drug users and transients.
examples.chinese: 无人居住的房子会吸引吸毒者和流浪者。

examples.english: Farther along the street was a transient who was carrying his belongings in a plastic bag.
examples.chinese: 街道深处有一名流浪者，背着一只装着他随身物品的塑料袋。

examples.english: A couple of bums were passing a bottle in a doorway.
examples.chinese: 门口有几个流浪汉传着一只酒瓶在喝酒。

examples.english: A bag lady with a shopping cart was picking through the garbage for aluminum cans.
examples.chinese: 一个手推购物车的女流浪者在垃圾里翻找铝罐。

examples.english: An old tramp was sleeping under Waterloo Bridge, his coat wrapped tight to keep out the cold.
examples.chinese: 一个年老的乞丐睡在滑铁卢大桥下面，他把外衣包得紧紧的，以抵御寒冷。

examples.english: Our charity provides shelter, meals, and clothing for vagrants.
examples.chinese: 我们这个慈善机构向流浪者提供住宿、食物和衣服。

examples.english: The number of vagrants is increasing because of the lack of affordable accommodation for rent in the capital.
examples.chinese: 由于首府缺少廉租房屋，流浪者的数量正在增加。

centers.english: to own something

examples.english: We don't own the apartment, we're just renting it.
examples.chinese: 这公寓不是我们的，是我们租的。

examples.english: Clark owns about 40 companies in northern Europe.
examples.chinese: 克拉克在北欧拥有大约40家公司。

examples.english: They stayed in a villa once owned by the writer, Somerset Maugham.
examples.chinese: 他们住在一幢别墅里，以前这别墅为作家萨默塞特·毛姆所拥有。

examples.english: In National Parks, although the land is privately owned, there are strict controls on the use of the land.
examples.chinese: 国家公园的土地虽为私人所有，但是用地有严格的限制。

examples.english: We don't have a T.V.
examples.chinese: 我们没有电视机。

examples.english: How many of your students have a computer?
examples.chinese: 你的学生中有多少人有电脑?

examples.english: What kind of car has she got?
examples.chinese: 她有辆什么样的车?

examples.english: I've worked hard for everything I've got.
examples.chinese: 我所拥有的一切都是我通过努力得来的。

examples.english: Very few families in this area possess a telephone.
examples.chinese: 这地区很少家庭有电话。

examples.english: He never wore a suit - I don't think he possessed one.
examples.chinese: 他从不穿套装—我认为他根本没有套装。

examples.english: Because of his gambling, he lost everything he possessed.
examples.chinese: 他因为赌博输掉了他的全部所有。

examples.english: As well as owning Mirror Group Newspapers, the Maxwell Corporation also controlled several other businesses.
examples.chinese: 除了拥有镜报集团，麦斯威尔公司还控制着其他几家企业。

examples.english: The Johnson family has effective control of the company, owning almost 60% of the shares.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊家族实际上已控制了这家公司，他们持有接近60%的股票。

examples.english: She works for Le Monde, where the staff hold a significant stake in the company.
examples.chinese: 她在《世界报》供职，那里的员工持有公司大量的股份。

examples.english: a situation in which a husband and wife both hold shares in a family company
examples.chinese: 夫妻共同持有家族公司股份的局面

examples.english: Mr Davis has a 30% holding in owns 30% of Montague Enterprises.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯先生拥有蒙太格公司30%的股份。

examples.english: Labatt beer has a 45% stake in the Blue Jays baseball team.
examples.chinese: 拉巴特啤酒公司拥有布鲁杰斯棒球队45%的股份。

examples.english: She has a stake in her husband's company, which she will have to give up if they divorce.
examples.chinese: 她在她丈夫的公司中有股份，但是如果他们离婚，她就得放弃这些股份。

examples.english: The bank has interests in several companies, including a 15% share of Morgan's Brewery.
examples.chinese: 这家银行在好几家公司都拥有股权，包括摩根酿酒公司15%的股份。

examples.english: Although the government has made some shares in National Oil Products available, it intends to maintain its controlling interest.
examples.chinese: 虽然政府准备出售国家石油产品公司的部分股份，但它还是打算保持其控股权。

centers.english: when someone owns something

examples.english: This watch belonged to my grandfather.
examples.chinese: 这块手表原是我爷爷的。

examples.english: Who does that Walkman belong to?
examples.chinese: 那个随身听是谁的呢？

examples.english: A car believed to belong to the bank robbers was found abandoned yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天发现一辆被弃置的车辆，相信是属于银行劫匪的。

examples.english: This hymn book is the property of Pitt Street Methodist Church.
examples.chinese: 这本赞美诗是匹特街卫理公会礼拜堂的财产。

examples.english: If he defaults on the loan, the land will become the property of the bank.
examples.chinese: 如果他拖欠贷款，这块地将收归银行所有。

examples.english: ‘Hey, that's my pen!’ - ‘Sorry! I didn't know it was yours.’
examples.chinese: “嗨，那是我的钢笔！”—“对不起！我不知道是你的。”

examples.english: ‘Whose bike is that?’ ‘It's Martin's.’
examples.chinese: “那是谁的自行车？”“是马丁的。”

examples.english: The money wasn't Sara's to lend you in the first place Sara didn't have the right to lend it.
examples.chinese: 首先，这些钱不是萨拉的，她没有权借给你。

examples.english: Please can you move your car? It's blocking my driveway.
examples.chinese: 请把你的车移一下好吗？它挡着我的车道了。

examples.english: I've got a problem with my dishwasher.
examples.chinese: 我的洗碗机出问题了。

examples.english: My grandmother lives near your place -- just around the corner in fact.
examples.chinese: 我祖母跟你住得很近—其实就在附近。

examples.english: You can rent skis or you can bring your own.
examples.chinese: 雪橇可租也可自己带来。

examples.english: Joe left the company to set up his own business.
examples.chinese: 乔离开公司自己创业。

expressions.text: a room/car/computer etc of your own

examples.english: Our neighbours let us use their garage, but we really need one of our own.
examples.chinese: 邻居让我们用他们的车库，但我们还是需要自己有一个。

examples.english: The charity provides accommodation for homeless people, and helps them find homes of their own.
examples.chinese: 这家慈善机构为无家可归者提供住宿，并协助他们寻找自己的居所。

examples.english: The dead man's personal possessions were sent back to his family.
examples.chinese: 死者的私人财物被送还给他的家人。

examples.english: You can arm and disarm the alarm system using your own personal access code.
examples.chinese: 你可以使用个人密码启动和解除警报装置。

centers.english: the person who owns something

examples.english: The previous owner painted the outside of the house yellow.
examples.chinese: 前一个业主把房子的外面漆成了黄色。

examples.english: The owners of the company live abroad.
examples.chinese: 公司的老板在国外居住。

examples.english: He is the proud owner of two Olympic gold medals.
examples.chinese: 他自豪地拥有两枚奥运会金牌。

examples.english: Car owners are facing a 10% rise in the price of gasoline.
examples.chinese: 车主面临着油价上调10%。

examples.english: Our landlord has promised to fix the heating by Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 房东答应我们星期二之前修好暖气。

examples.english: College accommodation offices provide lists of private landlords and landladies.
examples.chinese: 大学住宿部提供拥有私房的房东名单。

examples.english: Eddy Shah, the former national newspaper proprietor
examples.chinese: 埃迪·莎，这份全国性报纸的前老板

examples.english: My father had fallen victim to an unscrupulous garage proprietor.
examples.chinese: 我父亲被一个无耻的汽车修理厂老板欺骗了。

examples.english: As proprietors of the general store, Mr and Mrs Stacey knew everything that went on in the town.
examples.chinese: 斯泰西夫妇是杂货店店主，镇里发生的一切他们都知道。

examples.english: The police are giving advice to householders on how to improve the security of their homes.
examples.chinese: 警察正在向屋主建议如何加强家里的安保措施。

examples.english: Householders and tradesmen both use the refuse dump to dispose of their garbage.
examples.chinese: 住户和商贩都把垃圾扔在垃圾场。

examples.english: The latest rise in interest rates is bad news for home-owners.
examples.chinese: 最近利率调高，这对房主来说是个坏消息。

examples.english: The latest trend is for home-owners to carry out improvements before selling their properties.
examples.chinese: 最近，屋主在卖房子前一般都会先修缮一下。

centers.english: the things that someone owns

examples.english: Some of the stolen property was discovered in an empty warehouse.
examples.chinese: 其中一些被盗走的财物被发现藏在一个空置的仓库里。

examples.english: The boys have been charged with damaging school property.
examples.chinese: 那些男孩子被指控破坏学校财物。

examples.english: Many state documents were considered as the officer's private property.
examples.chinese: 州里的许多文件都被认为是这位官员的私人财产。

examples.english: They lost all their possessions in the floods.
examples.chinese: 他们在水灾中失去了所有的财产。

examples.english: Prisoners are allowed no personal possessions such as photographs of their families.
examples.chinese: 囚犯不准保留任何私人财物，例如家人的照片等。

examples.english: One of my most treasured possessions is a small book of prayers.
examples.chinese: 我的其中一件最宝贵的财物是一本小小的祈祷书。

examples.english: She always leaves her things all over the floor.
examples.chinese: 她总是把她的东西摊得满地都是。

examples.english: I don't how know I'm going to fit all my stuff into the new apartment.
examples.chinese: 我不知道怎样把我的这些东西都搬进新公寓去。

examples.english: They packed all their belongings into the car and left the city that night.
examples.chinese: 那天夜里，他们把自己所有的财物都装进车里，离开了这个城市。

examples.english: It doesn't cost much to insure your personal belongings.
examples.chinese: 投保个人财物不需要很多钱。

examples.english: The company has mining assets worth 8 billion Rand.
examples.chinese: 这家公司拥有价值80亿兰特的矿业资产。

examples.english: The government announced that it had frozen the assets of three senior bank officials.
examples.chinese: 政府宣布冻结三名银行高级职员的资产。

examples.english: Two old chairs, a broken jug, and half a candle: these were all his worldly goods.
examples.chinese: 两把旧椅子、一个破罐子和半根蜡烛一这是他的全部财产。

examples.english: All her worldly goods were contained in four cardboard boxes.
examples.chinese: 她所有的东西都装在四个纸板箱里。

centers.english: to say you have a right to be the legal owner or something

examples.english: Both Britain and Argentina lay claim to the Falkland Islands.
examples.chinese: 英国和阿根廷都声称拥有福克兰群岛的主权。

examples.english: A stranger who said he was my father's brother had arrived to lay claim to his fortune.
examples.chinese: 一个自称是我父亲弟弟的陌生人来了，声称对父亲的财产有继承权。

examples.english: If you want some of the furniture, now's the time to stake your claim.
examples.chinese: 这些家具如果你想要一些的话，现在就该去表明你拥有所有权。

centers.english: to deserve something good

examples.english: Well done. I think we all deserve a drink after that.
examples.chinese: 干得好。我觉得这件事完成后我们大家都值得喝一杯。

examples.english: Jill was awarded first prize, and she thoroughly deserved it.
examples.chinese: 吉尔获授一等奖，她完全是受之无愧。

examples.english: After all that hard work, you deserve a rest.
examples.chinese: 干了那么多活，你应该休息一下了。

examples.english: The team have trained hard and they deserve to do well.
examples.chinese: 这支球队训练刻苦，理应表现出色。

examples.english: Chang played better than Sampras, and he deserved to win.
examples.chinese: 张德培比桑普拉斯打得好，应该胜出。

examples.english: Anyone who can work with that man deserves a medal.
examples.chinese: 谁能和那个男人一起工作就该得奖章。

examples.english: The game ended in a well-deserved victory for the German team.
examples.chinese: 比赛以德国队获胜告终，这是理所当然的。

examples.english: At 9 o'clock, she settled down for a well-earned rest.
examples.chinese: 在9点时她停下来休息，也是该歇一歇了。

examples.english: I think Paul should get first prize - he's certainly earned it.
examples.chinese: 我觉得保罗应该得一等奖，他肯定是当之无愧的。

examples.english: Let's have a break now - we've definitely earned it.
examples.chinese: 现在我们歇一歇吧，这是我们应得的。

centers.english: to deserve something bad

examples.english: Anyone who drives like that deserves to lose their licence.
examples.chinese: 那样子开车的人活该被吊销驾驶执照。

examples.english: ‘You really weren't very nice to her.’ ‘Well, she deserved it!’
examples.chinese: “你对她态度可不好。”“哦，她自作自受！”

examples.english: He was a bully, and in the end he got what he deserved.
examples.chinese: 他喜欢恃强凌弱，结果是自作自受得了报应。

examples.english: ‘I feel terrible.’ ‘Serves you right for drinking so much last night.’
examples.chinese: “我觉得很不舒服。”“真是活该，谁叫你昨晚喝那么多酒。”

examples.english: It'd serve him right if Jo walked out on him.
examples.chinese: 乔不理他一走了之，也是他自作自受。

examples.english: ‘Do you feel sorry for him?’ ‘No, he shouldn't have hit that guy -- he got what he deserved.’
examples.chinese: “你替他难过吗？”“才不呢，他不该揍那家伙—他这是活该。”

examples.english: Anyone who invites a complete stranger into their house is asking for it.
examples.chinese: 谁把陌生人请到家里来就是在自讨苦吃了。

examples.english: I don't feel sorry for her at all. She had it coming.
examples.chinese: 我一点也不为她感到难过。这是她应有的下场。

expressions.text: had it coming to you/her etc

examples.english: ‘Terry's very upset about his wife leaving him.’ ‘Well he's had it coming to him for years.’
examples.chinese: “特里的太太离开了他，他很不开心。”“这么多年这事也早该发生了。”

examples.english: The evil Mr Grove gets his comeuppance at the end of the story.
examples.chinese: 故事的结尾，邪恶的格罗夫先生得到了应得的惩罚。

examples.english: She's callous and snobbish and it's time she got her comeuppance.
examples.chinese: 她这人又冷漠又势利眼，这下子可得了报应了。

examples.english: Tobin finally got his just deserts, and was sentenced to 8 years’ imprisonment.
examples.chinese: 托宾最终得到了应有的下场，被判了八年徒刑。

examples.english: This is a movie in which everyone gets their just deserts in the end.
examples.chinese: 这部影片中所有人最终都得到了应有的下场。

centers.english: to deserve an explanation/answer/apology etc
centers.chinese: 理应得到解释/答复/道歉等

examples.english: She feels she deserves an apology after all the cruel things you said about her.
examples.chinese: 她觉得你说了她那么多坏话，应该向她道个歉。

examples.english: Why didn't you turn up for the meeting? I think I'm at least owed some kind of explanation.
examples.chinese: 你为什么没来开会？我认为至少也该给我个解释。

examples.english: Why did ministers fail to inform the public of these dangers? The people of Britain deserve answers.
examples.chinese: 为何大臣们不预先告诉公众有这些危险？英国人民理应得到回答。

centers.english: to deserve attention

examples.english: Neal's book explores some interesting ideas which deserve attention.
examples.chinese: 尼尔的书探讨了一些有趣的观点，值得一读。

examples.english: This is a complex problem, that deserves closer consideration.
examples.chinese: 这是一个复杂的问题，需要更仔细的斟酌。

examples.english: It's an interesting idea and it certainly merits another look.
examples.chinese: 这想法有意思，无疑值得作进一步的考虑。

centers.english: to decide which one you want

examples.english: I can't decide what I want. You choose.
examples.chinese: 我决定不了要什么，你来选吧。

examples.english: Will you help me choose a present for Warren?
examples.chinese: 你帮我给沃伦挑选一份礼物，好吗?

examples.english: Why do so few women choose to become engineers?
examples.chinese: 为什么那么少女性选择当工程师？

examples.english: It took her three hours to choose which dress to wear.
examples.chinese: 她花了三个小时才决定穿哪套衣服。

examples.english: We have to choose between doing geography or studying another language.
examples.chinese: 我们得在学地理还是学另一门语言间作选择。

examples.english: Import restrictions will reduce the number of cars buyers have to choose from.
examples.chinese: 进口限制将会缩小汽车买主的选择范围。

examples.english: Pick a number from one to five.
examples.chinese: 从一至五中挑一个数字。

examples.english: Let me pick the movie tonight - I don't want to see another comedy.
examples.chinese: 让我选今晚的电影吧—我不想再看一场喜剧了。

examples.english: It's very important that parents select the right school for a child with learning difficulties.
examples.chinese: 家长为学习有困难的子女选择合适的学校是很重要的。

examples.english: Our wines have been carefully selected from vineyards throughout Europe.
examples.chinese: 我们的葡萄酒是从全欧洲的葡萄园中精选出来的。

examples.english: The team's name was selected from more than 1,700 suggestions.
examples.chinese: 这个队名是从1,700多个建议中选出来的。

examples.english: I don't usually go for horror movies.
examples.chinese: 我一般不喜欢恐怖影片。

examples.english: Whenever we eat out, she always goes for the most expensive thing on the menu.
examples.chinese: 我们每次下馆子吃饭，她总是点菜单上最贵的菜。

examples.english: I felt I was being forced to make a choice between my family and my job.
examples.chinese: 我觉得自己被迫在家庭和工作之间作出选择。

examples.english: It had been difficult to leave her unhappy marriage, but she had made her choice.
examples.chinese: 舍弃不幸福的婚姻很难，但是她已经作出了决定。

examples.english: Sean's decided to study law - I hope he's made the right choice.
examples.chinese: 肖恩决定学习法律—我希望他的选择是正确的。

examples.english: She showed me the box of kittens and told me I could take my pick.
examples.chinese: 她给我看了装小猫咪的盒子，叫我自己挑。

examples.english: With so many houses for sale, buyers with cash can take their pick.
examples.chinese: 有那么多房子出售，持现金的买主可以任意挑选。

examples.english: The program's top graduate took her pick of five job offers.
examples.chinese: 该课程的第一名在五份工作中任选了一份。

centers.english: to finally choose something after considering all the possibilities
centers.chinese: 仔细考虑所有的可能性后，最后选择某物

examples.english: Have you decided on a name for the baby yet?
examples.chinese: 你选定了孩子的名字吗？

examples.english: We couldn't decide on a new color for the kitchen, so we left it white.
examples.chinese: 我们决定不了给厨房刷什么新颜色，因此就让它保留原来的白色。

examples.english: Hiroaki wanted white and I wanted black, so we settled on grey.
examples.chinese: 广明想要白的，而我想要黑的，所以我们决定要灰的。

examples.english: Can we at least settle on a date for our next meeting?
examples.chinese: 至少，我们能不能约定下次会议的日期？

examples.english: We finally settled on Miami as the site of our next conference.
examples.chinese: 我们最终选定迈阿密为下次会议的召开地点。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: They thought of going to Madeira or mainland Spain, but finally plumped for the Canary Islands.
examples.chinese: 他们考虑过去马德拉群岛，也考虑过去西班牙本土，但最后决定去加那利群岛。

examples.english: She looked at every sweater in the shop before plumping for a red mohair one.
examples.chinese: 店里的每一件毛衫她都看过了，最后选了一件红色马海毛的。

examples.english: After college, Ruffin opted for the Army over college.
examples.chinese: 中学毕业后，拉芬选择了参军，不上大学。

examples.english: When her parents divorced, Mary Ann opted to live with her father.
examples.chinese: 父母离婚时，玛丽·安选择与父亲一同生活。

centers.english: to choose one person or thing from among a lot of similar things
centers.chinese: 从许多类似物中挑选出某物

examples.english: Could you single out one factor that is more important than the others?
examples.chinese: 你能挑出一个最重要的因素吗？

examples.english: His teacher was always singling him out, calling on him when his hand wasn't even raised.
examples.chinese: 即使没有举手，老师也常常会选中他，叫他回答问题。

examples.english: Captain Withers was singled out for special mention and was awarded the Military Cross.
examples.chinese: 威瑟斯上校受到特别嘉奖，获授“军功十字勋章”。

examples.english: He looked through the tourist guide and picked out a few exhibitions to see while he was in town.
examples.chinese: 他查看了旅游指南，选了几个展览，打算去城里时看。

examples.english: The editor looked through the file, picking the best models out for the fashion shoot.
examples.chinese: 编辑浏览了整个档案，为时装广告拍摄挑选出最好的模特儿。

centers.english: to choose someone for a job or team
centers.chinese: 选择某人做某件工作或参加某个队

examples.english: Companies are now using computers to help them choose new workers.
examples.chinese: 公司现在利用电脑来帮助他们挑选新员工。

examples.english: The board has unanimously chosen Cole as Gray's temporary replacement.
examples.chinese: 董事会一致推选科尔来临时替代格雷。

examples.english: Eventually, Jane was chosen to deliver the message.
examples.chinese: 最终选了简去送信。

examples.english: The college selects only twelve students a year from the thousands who apply.
examples.chinese: 这所学院每年从成千上万名申请者中只挑选出12名学员。

examples.english: We selected four applicants for interview.
examples.chinese: 我们选了四名申请者来面试。

examples.english: Ernst had been selected to play in the game against Belgium.
examples.chinese: 欧内斯特入选参加对比利时的比赛。

examples.english: The company has appointed a new sales director.
examples.chinese: 这家公司已任命了一位新的销售主管。

examples.english: Simpson has been appointed to the Memphis Branch board for a three-year term.
examples.chinese: 辛普森被派到孟菲斯分公司董事会任职，为期三年。

examples.english: They have appointed Jane Staller as their new East Coast manager.
examples.chinese: 他们任命简·施塔勒为东海岸区的新经理。

examples.english: A committee was appointed to consider changes to the Prison Service.
examples.chinese: 已委派了一个委员会负责考虑对监狱部门进行改革。

examples.english: The class was divided into four teams, and each group was asked to pick a leader.
examples.chinese: 这个班被分成四组，每组要选出一名组长。

examples.english: Joe picked Steve and Terry to be on his team.
examples.chinese: 乔将史蒂夫和特里选入自己的队。

examples.english: Do you think he might pick another woman for the Supreme Court?
examples.chinese: 你认为他会选其他女性进入最高法院吗？

examples.english: The editor of ‘The Times’ has resigned amid a political storm. His successor has not yet been named.
examples.chinese: 《泰晤士报》编辑在一场政治风暴中辞职，继任者尚未选定。

examples.english: McCarthy was recently named to the Small Business Committee.
examples.chinese: 麦卡锡近日被任命进入小企业委员会。

examples.english: The magazine has named Bonnie Fuller as deputy editor.
examples.chinese: 该杂志社任命邦尼·富勒为副编辑。

examples.english: We are naming Dr Bob McClure head of the IRC in China.
examples.chinese: 我们将任命他为部门主管。

examples.english: Mills is expected to be formally nominated to the board next month.
examples.chinese: 米尔斯有望下月被正式提名进入董事会。

examples.english: Lee was the first Chinese American nominated to head the Civil Rights Division.
examples.chinese: 李是第一位被提名领导人权事务部的美国华裔。

examples.english: They nominated her as the British spokesperson at the International Arms Conference.
examples.chinese: 他们提名她为国际军备大会上代表英国的发言人。

expressions.text: be shortlisted/be on the short list

examples.english: Three applicants have been shortlisted and will be invited for interview next week.
examples.chinese: 三名申请人被列入最终候选人名单，他们将获邀参加下周的面试。

examples.english: He's been on the President's short list for the job twice.
examples.chinese: 他已两次被总统列入该职位最后候选人名单。

examples.english: Reinhardt was tapped for the federal bench in 1980 by former President Carter.
examples.chinese: 1980年莱因哈特被前总统卡特任命为联邦法官。

centers.english: to choose someone or something for a particular purpose
centers.chinese: 为了某种目的挑选某人或某物

examples.english: A committee will be selected to choose the new leader.
examples.chinese: 将选出一个委员会来决定新的领导人。

examples.english: Seattle has been chosen as the venue for next year's conference.
examples.chinese: 西雅图被选为明年会议召开的地点。

examples.english: Many of the industries chosen for government investment have in fact already gone bankrupt.
examples.chinese: 许多被选为政府投资项目的企业实际上已经破产。

examples.english: The fabric that she chose to be made into a dress is a combination of silk and cotton.
examples.chinese: 她选用的衣料是丝棉的混纺品。

centers.english: the decision you make when you choose

examples.english: It was a difficult choice, but we finally decided that Hannah should have the prize.
examples.chinese: 挑选起来很难，但我们最终决定汉娜应该获奖。

examples.english: The board denied that financial considerations had influenced their choice.
examples.chinese: 董事会否认财政上的考虑影响他们的选择。

examples.english: Patients are demanding greater choice in the type of treatment they get.
examples.chinese: 病人要求有更多可以选择的疗法。

examples.english: I don't believe in fate - we all have freedom of choice.
examples.chinese: 我不相信命运—我们都可以自由选择。

examples.english: He says he lives on the street by choice.
examples.chinese: 他声称是自愿露宿街头的。

centers.english: something or someone that has been chosen

examples.english: Maria was very pleased with her choice.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚对自己选的东西很满意。

examples.english: Greece was our first choice for a vacation, but all the flights were full.
examples.chinese: 希腊是我们度假的首选地，但是所有航班都满了。

examples.english: I don't like his choice of friends.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢他交的那些朋友。

examples.english: She showed me a selection of her drawings.
examples.chinese: 她给我看了她的画作选。

examples.english: a selection of songs from ‘West Side Story’
examples.chinese: 《西区故事》歌曲精选

examples.english: I want my children to be successful in their chosen careers.
examples.chinese: 我希望孩子们在他们自己选择的事业中获得成功。

examples.english: You have two minutes to answer questions on your chosen subject.
examples.chinese: 你有两分钟的时间来回答你所选课题中的问题。

examples.english: The flavorful vegetables require only melted butter and some well-chosen herbs.
examples.chinese: 美味的蔬菜只需加上融化的黄油和一些合适的香草就行了。

examples.english: There is a discount of 10% off selected items in this store.
examples.chinese: 在这家店里，部分商品九折销售。

examples.english: The book is a collection of selected essays by D.H.Lawrence.
examples.chinese: 本书是D.H.劳伦斯的散文选集。

examples.english: A small and carefully selected group of friends has been invited to the wedding.
examples.chinese: 少数仔细挑选出的朋友获邀参加婚礼。

examples.english: The school is staffed with handpicked educators and psychiatric specialists.
examples.chinese: 这所学校配备有精英教员和精神科专家。

examples.english: With a small, hand-picked squad of ex-paratroopers, Collins managed to get through the defences.
examples.chinese: 科林斯带着一支由精心挑选的前伞兵队员组成的小分队设法通过了防御工事。

examples.english: The magician told her to hold up three cards of her choice.
examples.chinese: 魔术师让她任选三张牌举起来。

examples.english: You could win a fabulous weekend break at a luxurious hotel of your choice.
examples.chinese: 你获奖后可以任意挑选一家豪华旅馆，在那里度过一个美妙的周末。

centers.english: the things or people that you can choose from

examples.english: The school seems OK, but there isn't a great choice of courses.
examples.chinese: 该校看上去不错，可是供选择的课程不是很多。

examples.english: With her high grades and athletic skill, Celeste had her choice of colleges.
examples.chinese: 西莉斯特成绩优秀又有运动技能，可以随意挑选大学。

expressions.text: have no choice but to do something

examples.english: Spooner says he had no choice but to file for bankruptcy.
examples.chinese: 施普纳说他别无选择，只能申请破产。

examples.english: There is a wide choice of hotels and hostels in the town.
examples.chinese: 镇上有许多酒店和旅舍可供选择。

examples.english: He basically has two options: he can have the surgery, or he can give up playing football.
examples.chinese: 他大致有两种选择：要么动手术，要么放弃踢球。

examples.english: I haven't signed any contracts yet - I want to keep my options open.
examples.chinese: 我还没有签任何合同—我想暂且不作决定。

examples.english: Did you consider other alternatives before you moved in with Lucy?
examples.chinese: 搬去和露西同住之前，你还考虑过其他办法吗?

examples.english: There is no practical alternative to our current policy.
examples.chinese: 没有其他实用的办法可代替我们目前的政策。

examples.english: He says he doesn't want to see a doctor, but I'm afraid he has no alternative.
examples.chinese: 他说他不想看医生，可是我恐怕他别无选择。

examples.english: A wonderful selection of cakes and pastries was displayed in the window.
examples.chinese: 橱窗里陈列着可供选购的各种美味蛋糕和油酥点心。

examples.english: The restaurant offers a wide selection of local dishes.
examples.chinese: 那家餐厅有许多地方菜可供挑选。

examples.english: There are a lot of good restaurants downtown to choose from.
examples.chinese: 市中心有许多好的餐厅可以选择。

examples.english: Portland has so many theaters to choose from.
examples.chinese: 波特兰有许多剧院可以选择。

centers.english: when you are very careful about choosing things

examples.english: I get offered a lot of work now, so I can be more choosy.
examples.chinese: 眼下有许多工作给我干，所以我可以更挑剔些。

examples.english: She's very choosy about what airline she travels on.
examples.chinese: 她出行时对于航空公司要求很高。

examples.english: Maybe I'm too picky, but all the guys I meet seem so boring.
examples.chinese: 可能是我太挑剔了，但是我遇到的家伙似乎都很乏味。

examples.english: She was always very fussy about her clothes.
examples.chinese: 她对于自己的服装总是很挑剔。

examples.english: We're not really picky eaters, but we don't eat much fast food.
examples.chinese: 我们不是很挑剔的食客，但是不常吃快餐。

examples.english: He's very particular about the clothes he buys.
examples.chinese: 他对自己买的服装很讲究。

examples.english: Monica is particular about what she eats - no meat, and only organic vegetables.
examples.chinese: 莫妮卡对食物很挑剔——不吃肉，只吃有机蔬菜。

examples.english: You've got to be very selective when choosing a roommate.
examples.chinese: 选择室友的时候一定要非常仔细。

examples.english: People are becoming more and more selective about the food they eat these days.
examples.chinese: 如今，人们对食品越来越讲究了。

examples.english: Never buy the first car you see. Always shop around.
examples.chinese: 千万不能看到一辆车就买下来，什么时候都要货比三家。

examples.english: Shop around a little bit before you choose a therapist.
examples.chinese: 选定治疗专家之前要多看看，比较一下。

examples.english: You should shop around for a better price.
examples.chinese: 你应当货比三家，找个好价钱。

centers.english: instead of another thing, place, time etc
centers.chinese: 代替另外的事物、地点、时间等

examples.english: We didn't have enough money to go to a movie, so we went to the park instead.
examples.chinese: 我们没有足够的钱去看电影，所以就去了公园。

examples.english: I can't manage Thursday. Can we meet on Friday instead?
examples.chinese: 周四我不行，我们改为周五见面怎么样？

examples.english: Can I have soup instead of salad?
examples.chinese: 我不要沙拉而要汤行吗？

examples.english: You should talk to your teacher instead of just complaining to me about it.
examples.chinese: 你应该和老师谈谈，而不是只是跟我抱怨这件事。

examples.english: She uses lemon rather than vinegar in her salad dressings.
examples.chinese: 在沙拉调料中，她用柠檬而不用醋。

examples.english: Rather than driving around all day looking for somewhere to park, why don't you take a bus into town?
examples.chinese: 与其开车开一整天找停车处，为何不坐公共汽车进城呢？

examples.english: A Walt Disney film is being shown in place of the advertised programme.
examples.chinese: 现在放映一部沃尔特·迪斯尼的电影来代替事先预告的那个节目。

examples.english: For this recipe you can always use olive oil in place of butter.
examples.chinese: 这个菜谱中，你总可以用橄榄油来代替黄油。

examples.english: The newspaper has stopped having a crossword puzzle and in its place they now have a weekly wordsearch competition.
examples.chinese: 这家报纸现已不刊登纵横字谜游戏了，取而代之的是每周一期的寻字比赛。

examples.english: The original plan was abandoned in favour of a new proposal.
examples.chinese: 原计划被放弃，采纳了新的建议。

examples.english: Communist theory and practice has been rejected in favour of American-style capitalism.
examples.chinese: 福利主义已被抛弃，实行了美国式的资本主义。

examples.english: In Languedoc, local wines are drunk in preference to wines from other parts of France.
examples.chinese: 在朗格多克，人们喜欢喝本地产的，而非法国其他地方产的葡萄酒。

examples.english: Children often choose high-fat fast foods in preference to fresh, healthy ones.
examples.chinese: 儿童常常会选择高脂肪的快餐食品，而不是新鲜的、有益的食品。

examples.english: Because you worked on Sunday, you can have a day off in lieu.
examples.chinese: 由于周日上了班，你可以休假一天。

examples.english: Occasionally, he makes his staff work overtime and gives them time off in lieu.
examples.chinese: 他偶尔让员工加班，再给他们补假。

examples.english: They used to give the landlord poultry and eggs in lieu of rent.
examples.chinese: 以前，他们把家禽和鸡蛋给房东代替租金。

centers.english: instead of another person

examples.english: Jo couldn't go to the meeting, so I said I'd go instead.
examples.chinese: 乔不能出席会议，所以我就说我代她去。

examples.english: Gillespie will play in midfield instead of Cochrane.
examples.chinese: 吉莱斯皮将替代科克伦踢中场位置。

examples.english: I can't understand why they chose him instead of you -- you're much better qualified for the job.
examples.chinese: 我不明白他们为何选他而没选你—这个工作你的资历比他合适得多。

expressions.text: in somebody's place/in place of somebody

examples.english: Mr Lloyd resigned and asked Mr Graham to serve in his place.
examples.chinese: 劳埃德先生辞职了，他请格雷厄姆先生代替他的位置。

examples.english: I'm not playing in next week's game and I'm not sure who will be playing in my place.
examples.chinese: 下周的比赛我不参加了，我不清楚谁来替我。

examples.english: A new manager was appointed in place of Hoddle.
examples.chinese: 新任命了一位经理接替霍德尔。

examples.english: The old man downstairs was ill, so Linda said she'd go shopping for him.
examples.chinese: 楼下的老人病了，所以琳达说她可以去代他购物。

examples.english: You shouldn't be carrying those heavy cases -- let me do it for you.
examples.chinese: 你不应该搬那些重箱子—我来替你搬。

expressions.text: on behalf of somebody/on somebody's behalf

examples.english: On behalf of everyone here, I'd like to wish you a long and happy retirement.
examples.chinese: 我代表这里的所有人祝你长寿、退休生活愉快。

examples.english: Richardson's lawyer agreed to speak to journalists on his behalf.
examples.chinese: 理查森的律师同意代表他去与记者谈话。

centers.english: to start doing a job that someone else used to do
centers.chinese: 开始做以前由别人做的工作

examples.english: We're looking for someone to replace our managing director.
examples.chinese: 我们正在找人接替我们的总经理。

examples.english: The lead singer was replaced by Ray Willis back in 1992.
examples.chinese: 1992年时，主唱歌手的位置由雷·威利斯接替了。

examples.english: It was Johnson's first season after replacing Tom Landry as coach of the Cowboys.
examples.chinese: 那是约翰逊接替汤姆·兰德利担任牛仔队教练后的首个赛季。

examples.english: The President appointed Harold Brown to succeed Les Aspin as chairman of the Commission in 1995.
examples.chinese: 1995年总统任命哈罗德·布朗接替莱斯·阿斯平任委员会主席。

examples.english: George VI died in 1952, leaving his elder daughter Elizabeth to succeed him.
examples.chinese: 乔治六世于1952年逝世，由大女儿伊丽莎白继位。

expressions.text: take somebody's place/take the place of somebody

examples.english: There's no one suitable to take Simon's place when he leaves.
examples.chinese: 西蒙离开后，没有合适的人能取代他的位置。

examples.english: If Mark fails to qualify as a trainee, Margaret is designated to take his place.
examples.chinese: 如果马克不合资格当实习生，就选派玛格丽特去接替他的位置。

examples.english: Thielen will take the place of Ray Owens on the board following Owens's retirement.
examples.chinese: 雷·欧文斯退休后，蒂伦将接替他在董事会的职位。

examples.english: The new manager took over in July.
examples.chinese: 新经理于7月份接任了。

examples.english: Do you think you'd be able to take over me when I'm gone?
examples.chinese: 你觉得我走后你能接替我吗？

examples.english: The attorney general of New Jersey took over from the local district attorney in the case.
examples.chinese: 新泽西州的首席检察官从当地的地区律师手里接手了此案。

examples.english: We're pleased to announce that Mr. Schmidt will be taking over as Executive Director.
examples.chinese: 我们很高兴地宣布施密特先生将接任执行董事一职。

examples.english: Glover's understudy took over the role on Broadway.
examples.chinese: 格洛弗的替角接替了他在百老汇的角色。

examples.english: Maria's been my partner since I took the business over from my father.
examples.chinese: 自从我接管了父亲的生意以后，玛丽亚一直是我的搭档。

examples.english: General Salan was supplanted soon after the invasion by General Henri Navarre.
examples.chinese: 亨利·纳瓦拉将军入侵后，很快就排挤掉了萨朗将军。

examples.english: Adams, an excellent new pitcher, may supplant Hayes as starting pitcher by the end of the year.
examples.chinese: 出色的新投手亚当斯可能到年底就会取代海斯而成为先发投手。

centers.english: to do someone's job or work for a temporary period
centers.chinese: 暂时替代某人的职位或工作

examples.english: Can you stand in for me at the meeting next week?
examples.chinese: 你能代我去开下星期的会议吗？

examples.english: The President was unavailable and had the Vice President stand in for him.
examples.chinese: 总统没有空，就让副总统暂时代替他。

examples.english: During the dangerous scenes, a stunt woman stood in for Goldie Hawn.
examples.chinese: 拍摄危险镜头时将由一位女特技演员代替戈尔迪·霍恩。

examples.english: Liz, could you take over in reception while I make a couple of phone calls?
examples.chinese: 莉兹，我去打几个电话，你能接替一下接待工作吗？

examples.english: Can I see you in my office, Carl? I'm sure Dan can take over from you.
examples.chinese: 你到我办公室来一下好吗，卡尔？丹会帮你照看的。

examples.english: After we'd stopped for lunch Sheila took over the driving for a while.
examples.chinese: 我们停下来吃午饭以后，希拉替我们开了一会儿车。

examples.english: My boss had to go to the Caribbean unexpectedly and asked me to deputize.
examples.chinese: 我的老板忽然要去加勒比海办事，于是就让我代理一下。

examples.english: The Foreign Minister will be deputizing for the Prime Minister while he recovers from his operation.
examples.chinese: 首相在手术后的恢复期间将由外交部长代理其职务。

examples.english: Paine, the second in command, deputized for the Colonel.
examples.chinese: 副指挥佩因代理上校的指挥工作。

examples.english: Could you sub for me Monday? I have a doctor's appointment.
examples.chinese: 星期一你能代我的课吗？我和医生约好了。

examples.english: Eisenreich subbed for the injured Alou in Wednesday's game.
examples.chinese: 星期三的比赛中，艾森赖希代替受伤的阿洛乌上场。

examples.english: Can anyone relieve Tammy? She's been on duty for ten hours without a break.
examples.chinese: 谁能接替塔米？她已连续值班十小时没有休息过了。

examples.english: He was sent to Cairo to relieve Captain Roberts for a few days.
examples.chinese: 他被派往开罗去接替罗伯茨上尉几天。

examples.english: Go and get some lunch. I'll cover for you.
examples.chinese: 去吃午饭吧，我来替你。

examples.english: My name's Dr Brown. I'm covering for Dr Steele while he's on holiday.
examples.chinese: 我叫布朗博士，斯蒂尔博士去度假了，我来代他。

centers.english: someone who replaces another person

examples.english: Steve just announced he was leaving, but the coach has already started looking around for a replacement.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫刚宣布他要走，教练就已经开始到处找接替他的人了。

examples.english: I'm just a temporary replacement for the receptionist.
examples.chinese: 我只是暂时接替一下当接待员而已。

examples.english: They asked Barbara to stay on until they could find a suitable replacement for her.
examples.chinese: 他们叫芭芭拉在找到合适的接替者之前继续留任。

examples.english: Mason is Case's chosen successor as committee chairman.
examples.chinese: 梅森是凯斯指定的委员会主席接班人。

examples.english: Smyth resigned as Chief Superintendent two months ago and they still haven't appointed his successor.
examples.chinese: 史密斯在两个月以前辞去了总警司的职务，他们仍没有委任继任人。

examples.english: The Orchestra is currently searching for a successor to music director James Sedares.
examples.chinese: 管弦乐队目前正在寻找接替音乐总监詹姆斯·赛达瑞斯的人。

examples.english: Ms Green couldn't be here today, so I'm her stand-in.
examples.chinese: 格林女士今天不能来了，所以我来临时替代她。

examples.english: Ann was Shirley MacLaine's stand-in in the movie.
examples.chinese: 安是雪莉·麦克雷恩在这部影片中的替身。

examples.english: I'd like Tom to act as a stand-in for Julian until he returns to work.
examples.chinese: 朱利安回来工作之前，我希望由汤姆临时代替他。

examples.english: If Marsh has not fully recovered, his likely substitute will be Robinson.
examples.chinese: 如果马什未能完全康复，那么担任替补的很可能是罗宾逊。

examples.english: With key players out of energy, it was a sub who scored six points in the last two minutes and won the game.
examples.chinese: 当主力队员都精疲力竭之际，一名替补队员在最后两分钟内得了六分，赢了比赛。

expressions.text: bring somebody on as a substitute for somebody

examples.english: Ten minutes into the second half Davies was brought on as substitute for Ward.
examples.chinese: 下半场开始十分钟后，戴维斯被派上场代替沃德。

examples.english: While Kershaw was in the hospital Saunders became acting chairman.
examples.chinese: 克肖住院期间，桑德斯任代理主席。

examples.english: Mrs Hamilton has been appointed acting head of the school until a permanent replacement can be found.
examples.chinese: 汉密尔顿夫人被任命为代校长，直至找到正式的接替者。

examples.english: We'll need a sub for Dawn's class tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我们需要找个代课老师去上明天唐的班级的课。

examples.english: The kids always misbehave when they have a substitute teacher.
examples.chinese: 孩子们遇到代课教师上课时总要捣蛋。

examples.english: Ray was working as a supply teacher to earn some extra money.
examples.chinese: 雷在做代课老师来挣点外快。

centers.english: to put someone into someone else's job
centers.chinese: 使某人代替别人的工作

examples.english: They still haven't replaced three of the managers who resigned.
examples.chinese: 他们仍未找到人来替代那三名辞职的经理。

examples.english: I hate to see Gretchen go - we'll never be able to replace her.
examples.chinese: 我不希望格蕾琴离开，我们再也找不到能替代她的人了。

examples.english: The firm has been dismissing experienced staff and replacing them with younger people on lower salaries.
examples.chinese: 公司在解雇经验丰富的员工，并以较低的薪水雇用年轻人取代他们。

centers.english: to replace an older type of machine, method etc
centers.chinese: 更换掉较旧式的机器、方法等

examples.english: In most offices, computers have replaced the old typewriters.
examples.chinese: 在大多数办公室内，电脑已取代了旧式的打字机。

examples.english: One ‘smart card’ can take the place of cash, cheques, and credit cards.
examples.chinese: 一张“智能卡”就可代替现金、支票和信用卡。

examples.english: Gas and electricity have almost completely replaced coal for domestic cooking and heating in Britain.
examples.chinese: 在英国，煤气和电在家居煮食和取暖方面差不多已完全取代了煤。

examples.english: Ugly new concrete buildings have taken the place of the old houses.
examples.chinese: 丑陋的新混凝土大楼已经取代了那些老房子。

examples.english: Iron began to supersede bronze for tool making about 3000 years ago.
examples.chinese: 大约三千年前，铁开始取代铜用于制造工具。

examples.english: The computers used to be top of the line, but they have been superseded by more recent models.
examples.chinese: 这种电脑曾是最尖端的，但现在已经被更新式的型号取代了。

examples.english: It is unlikely that scientific thinking will ever entirely supersede superstition and religion.
examples.chinese: 科学的思维不大可能彻底取代迷信和宗教。

examples.english: Hunting and fishing settlements gave way to small towns as the population grew.
examples.chinese: 随着人口的增长，渔猎部落逐渐被小城镇所取代。

examples.english: With the rise in oil prices, big American cars were forced to give way to smaller, more economical models.
examples.chinese: 随着石油价格的上涨，大型美国汽车被迫让位于更小巧、更经济的车型。

centers.english: to put something new in the place of something old, damaged, or broken
centers.chinese: 拿新的东西取代旧的或破损的东西

examples.english: Your car's in good condition but you ought to replace the tires.
examples.chinese: 你的汽车保养得很好，不过你应该把轮胎换一换了。

examples.english: Before we move in, the place has to be redecorated and all the carpets replaced.
examples.chinese: 我们搬进来之前，这个地方要重新装修，所有地毯也都要换掉。

examples.english: They're going to replace the old wooden bridge with one made of concrete.
examples.chinese: 他们打算造一座水泥桥来替换这座旧木桥。

examples.english: You should check the engine carefully, renewing any parts that are worn or damaged.
examples.chinese: 你应该仔细检查一下引擎，把已经磨损或损坏的部件更换下来。

examples.english: It is wise to renew your water filter every month, even though it may seem to be working satisfactorily.
examples.chinese: 滤水器可能看上去用得很好，但每月更换一下还是明智的。

examples.english: Can you change this light bulb for me? I can't reach.
examples.chinese: 你能帮我把这个灯泡换下来吗？我够不着。

examples.english: All drivers should really know how to change a flat tire.
examples.chinese: 所有的驾车者都应该很熟悉怎样更换漏气的轮胎。

examples.english: You should change or clean your furnace filter once a month to improve performance.
examples.chinese: 你应该每月一次更换或清洁暖气炉上的过滤器以提高其性能。

centers.english: to use one thing instead of something else or change one thing for another
centers.chinese: 用一物代替另一物或换掉另一物

examples.english: If plums are difficult to find, figs can be substituted.
examples.chinese: 如果很难找到李子，可以用无花果代替。

examples.english: You can substitute margarine for butter in this recipe.
examples.chinese: 这道菜里可以用人造黄油来替代黄油。

examples.english: Someone must have switched the suitcases at the airport when I wasn't paying attention.
examples.chinese: 在机场时肯定有人趁我不注意把旅行箱掉包了。

examples.english: Wait till he goes out, then we can swap your book for his.
examples.chinese: 等他出去，我们就可以把你的书跟他的偷换一下。

centers.english: to go to the place where you were before

examples.english: I left my hometown 12 years ago, and I have no desire to go back.
examples.chinese: 我12年前离开家乡，没想要回去。

examples.english: When will you be going back to Japan?
examples.chinese: 你什么时候回日本?

examples.english: We'll have to go back for the tickets - I think I left them on the desk.
examples.chinese: 我们得回去拿票，我想我把票留在书桌上了。

examples.english: It's cold out here - shall we go back inside?
examples.chinese: 这外面很冷，我们回到里面去好吗?

examples.english: The phone started ringing again as soon as I went back upstairs.
examples.chinese: 我刚回到楼上，电话又响了起来。

expressions.text: go back the way you came

examples.english: Part of the trail was flooded, so we had to go back the way we had come.
examples.chinese: 小径的部分路段已经被水淹了，因此我们只得按原路返回。

examples.english: Frank's gone back home to visit his parents and won't be back for a week.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克回家去探望父母，一周后才回来。

examples.english: Rachel's left me, and I don't think she'll ever come back.
examples.chinese: 雷切尔离我而去，我想她是再也不回来了。

examples.english: When will you be coming back to London?
examples.chinese: 你什么时候回伦敦来?

examples.english: He's just come back from a vacation in Miami.
examples.chinese: 他刚从迈阿密度假回来。

examples.english: Whoever left the gloves will probably come back for them tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 忘了拿走手套的人明天可能会回来拿的。

examples.english: I left early, but promised to return the next day.
examples.chinese: 我一早就离开了，但答应第二天回来。

examples.english: He had to return to India to look after his mother.
examples.chinese: 他不得不回印度照顾母亲。

examples.english: Alastair returned from the office late that night.
examples.chinese: 那晚阿拉斯泰尔很晚才从办公室回来。

examples.english: As the soldiers returned home, their wives had to readjust to living with them again.
examples.chinese: 士兵们回家后，他们的妻子要重新适应与他们一起生活。

examples.english: It's late - I should go home now.
examples.chinese: 天晚了—我现在该回家了。

examples.english: John used to go home once a month when he was at college.
examples.chinese: 约翰过去上大学时每月回家一次。

examples.english: I've enjoyed my time in Europe, but I'm really looking forward to going home to America.
examples.chinese: 我在欧洲过得很开心，但我很渴望回到美国的家里去。

examples.english: What time did you get in last night?
examples.chinese: 你昨晚什么时候回家的?

examples.english: I usually get home about 7:30 - you can try calling me after that.
examples.chinese: 我通常7点半左右回家，你可以试试在那时间以后打电话给我。

examples.english: He hasn't had anything to eat yet. He just got home from work.
examples.chinese: 他还没吃过东西。他才下班回来。

examples.english: Jack! What a surprise! How long have you been back?
examples.chinese: 杰克！真想不到！你回来多久了?

examples.english: Carol is away on business, but she should be back next week.
examples.chinese: 卡萝尔出差去了，不过下周她该回来了。

examples.english: We'll get together when you're back from vacation.
examples.chinese: 等你度假回来我们聚一下。

examples.english: We took the train to Paris, but flew back.
examples.chinese: 我们坐火车去巴黎，但乘飞机回来。

examples.english: We cycled back from the beach in the evening.
examples.chinese: 晚上我们从沙滩骑自行车回来。

examples.english: It was a beautiful day, so I decided to walk back to the office.
examples.chinese: 天气很好，所以我决定步行回办公室。

centers.english: to go back to a place that you have visited before
centers.chinese: 回到你以前去过的地方

examples.english: China was fascinating - I hope I'll be able to return one day.
examples.chinese: 中国真太迷人了，我希望有一天能再回去。

examples.english: The dentist says I have to go back again next week for a check up.
examples.chinese: 牙医说我下个星期得回去复查一下。

examples.english: These birds return to the same place every year to build their nests.
examples.chinese: 这些鸟每年会返回同一个地方筑巢。

examples.english: He'll have to go back to Moscow in June to finalize the deal.
examples.chinese: 他得于6月份返回莫斯科去完成这笔交易。

examples.english: Maria was eager to revisit her first school.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚渴望重访她上的第一所学校。

examples.english: They revisited many of the places they had gone to on their honeymoon.
examples.chinese: 他们重游了许多当年度蜜月时去过的地方。

centers.english: when you return somewhere

examples.english: We eagerly await your return.
examples.chinese: 我们热切地等你回来。

examples.english: Immediately after his return he was forced to do his military service.
examples.chinese: 他刚回来就被迫服兵役去了。

examples.english: On her return, she found that someone had broken into her apartment.
examples.chinese: 她一回来就发现有人闯入了她的公寓。

examples.english: Albertson died within one year of his return from Africa.
examples.chinese: 艾伯森从非洲回来后不到一年就去世了。

examples.english: We arranged a party for my brother's homecoming, when he returned from five years in Australia.
examples.chinese: 哥哥去了澳大利亚五年后回来时，我们安排了一次聚会欢迎他回家。

examples.english: Coming back for her uncle's funeral was not a happy homecoming for her.
examples.chinese: 回来参加叔叔的葬礼对她来说可不是一次愉快的回家之行。

centers.english: a journey back to the place where you started

examples.english: The sea was much calmer on the return voyage.
examples.chinese: 返航的时候大海平静多了。

examples.english: The return trip took about an hour less than the trip there.
examples.chinese: 回程比去时少花了约一小时。

examples.english: How long will it take to drive there and back?
examples.chinese: 开车来回要多久?

examples.english: ‘How far is it to Milwaukee?’ ‘It's about 30 miles there and back.’
examples.chinese: “到密尔沃基有多远？”“来回大约30英里。”

centers.english: a ticket that allows you to go somewhere and to return to where you started
centers.chinese: 让你去某地然后再回来的票

examples.english: How much is a return ticket to Dublin?
examples.chinese: 到都柏林的来回票要多少钱？

examples.english: Would you like singles or returns, Sir?
examples.chinese: 你要单程票还是往返票，先生?

examples.english: It costs $475 return to Helsinki for a return ticket to Helsinki.
examples.chinese: 到赫尔辛基的往返票要475美元。

examples.english: There's no point in buying a one-way ticket when a round-trip ticket is the same price.
examples.chinese: 和往返票一样价格的话，买单程票就不合算了。

examples.english: The ferry costs only $5 round-trip per person.
examples.chinese: 渡轮每人来回只要五美元。

centers.english: to catch a ball or other moving object
centers.chinese: 抓住球或其他移动的物体

examples.english: Ted caught the ball and threw it back to his brother.
examples.chinese: 特德接住球，把它扔回给弟弟。

examples.english: Jenny tried to catch the frisbee with her left hand but dropped it.
examples.chinese: 珍妮试图用左手抓住飞碟，但弄掉了。

examples.english: That was a great catch!
examples.chinese: 接球漂亮！

centers.english: when the police catch a criminal

examples.english: Police say they are determined to catch the killer.
examples.chinese: 警方称他们决意要抓获凶手。

examples.english: A lot of thieves never get caught.
examples.chinese: 许多贼永远也抓不住。

examples.english: Police arrested twenty-six demonstrators.
examples.chinese: 警方逮捕了26名示威者。

examples.english: Nine men were arrested in drug raids, Saturday.
examples.chinese: 在星期六的扫毒行动中九名男子被捕。

examples.english: Wallace was arrested for assault.
examples.chinese: 华莱士因侵犯他人而遭逮捕。

examples.english: Dwayne has been arrested for drunk driving again.
examples.chinese: 德韦恩又一次因酒后驾车被捕。

examples.english: Kramer's confession led to the arrests of six others.
examples.chinese: 克雷默的供述使得另外六个人被捕。

examples.english: Guzman, twenty-five, was placed under arrest at his parents’ home, Friday.
examples.chinese: 古茨曼，25岁，星期五在其父母家中被捕。

examples.english: Police made several arrests over the weekend in connection with last year's courthouse bombing.
examples.chinese: 周末，警方逮捕了数名与去年法院爆炸案有关的人。

examples.english: They still haven't got the man who did it.
examples.chinese: 他们还没有抓到作案者。

examples.english: Police use radar to nail speeding drivers.
examples.chinese: 警方使用雷达来抓超速驾驶的司机。

examples.english: Myers was nailed for selling marijuana.
examples.chinese: 迈尔斯因出售大麻被抓。

examples.english: Officers took three suspects into custody Friday morning.
examples.chinese: 星期五早晨，警方拘留了三名嫌疑犯。

examples.english: As soon as the plane landed, the men were taken into custody by waiting FBI agents.
examples.chinese: 飞机一降落，那几名男子就被等候着的联邦调查局探员拘留。

centers.english: to catch someone doing something wrong

examples.english: Pat caught her daughter stealing money from her purse.
examples.chinese: 帕特当场抓住女儿从自己的钱包中偷钱。

examples.english: Brooks was caught smoking in an airplane lavatory and fined $750 dollars.
examples.chinese: 布鲁克斯在飞机盥洗室抽烟当场被抓，罚了750美元。

expressions.text: catch somebody red-handed/catch somebody in the act

examples.english: Sperling was caught red-handed attempting to break into a house.
examples.chinese: 斯珀林正要闯进一所房子时当场被抓。

examples.english: Several graffiti artists were caught in the act on the Brown River bridge.
examples.chinese: 数名涂鸦艺术家在布朗河大桥上乱画，当场被抓。

expressions.text: catch somebody in the act of doing something

examples.english: He caught Wendy in the act of looking through his personal papers.
examples.chinese: 他当场抓住温迪偷看他的私人文件。

expressions.text: catch somebody with their fingers in the till

examples.english: The article says that at least five government officials have been caught with their fingers in the till.
examples.chinese: 那篇文章称至少有五名政府官员因侵吞公款被抓。

centers.english: to catch someone and make them a prisoner

examples.english: They've captured twenty enemy soldiers.
examples.chinese: 他们已俘虏了20名敌兵。

examples.english: Cole was captured after his plane was shot down outside Hanoi.
examples.chinese: 科尔的飞机在河内城外被击落，他因而被俘。

examples.english: They are offering a reward for information leading to his capture.
examples.chinese: 他们悬赏缉捕他。

examples.english: Officers succeeded in rounding up most of the gang members.
examples.chinese: 警察围捕了大多数团伙成员。

examples.english: People are saying that the civil guard rounded several of the protestors up and shot them.
examples.chinese: 有人在说，民兵包围了数名抗议者并将他们集体射杀。

examples.english: Ellison was taken prisoner by the Germans during the retreat to Dunkirk.
examples.chinese: 埃利森在撤退至敦刻尔克时被德军俘虏了。

examples.english: Military police took Kilby prisoner and locked him in a barn.
examples.chinese: 宪兵俘虏了基尔比，把他关在谷仓里。

examples.english: 350 soldiers were killed and another 300 taken prisoner.
examples.chinese: 350名士兵被杀，另有300名士兵被俘。

examples.english: Viet Cong forces quickly recaptured the soldiers.
examples.chinese: 越共军队很快又抓获了那些士兵。

examples.english: The prisoners were recaptured a few hours after their escape.
examples.chinese: 那些犯人逃跑后几个小时又被抓获。

centers.english: to catch someone after chasing them

examples.english: ‘I bet you can't catch me!’ yelled Katie, skipping away.
examples.chinese: “我打赌你捉不到我！”凯蒂叫道，一边蹦蹦跳跳跑开了。

examples.english: You choose sides, and one team hides and the other team tries to catch them.
examples.chinese: 你来选参加哪一边：一队人躲，另一队人捉。

examples.english: Douglas was cornered by the killers in the back bedroom of a seventh-floor apartment.
examples.chinese: 道格拉斯被杀手逼进了七楼公寓后面的卧室，无法再逃了。

examples.english: The boys cornered him on a subway platform and began beating him.
examples.chinese: 那群男孩子将他逼进地铁站台，开始打他。

examples.english: Agents finally caught up with Danvers in Mexico City.
examples.chinese: 特工终于在墨西哥城追上了丹弗斯。

examples.english: Army troops are hunting down the guerrillas.
examples.chinese: 军队正在追捕游击队员。

examples.english: The agency was created to hunt down war criminals and bring them to justice.
examples.chinese: 这个部门是成立来追捕战犯，并将他们绳之以法的。

examples.english: The men were trapped at a road block near the junction of I-95 and Route 128.
examples.chinese: 那几名男子被围困在I-95和128公路交会处附近的一个路障。

examples.english: Police have the man trapped inside a bar on the city's southside.
examples.chinese: 警方在市南的一家酒吧里围捕了该名男子。

examples.english: If we're lucky, the thief will fall right into our trap.
examples.chinese: 如果我们运气好的话，那个贼会正好落入我们的圈套中。

centers.english: when you offer something to someone

examples.english: She didn't even offer me a cup of tea.
examples.chinese: 她甚至没给我泡杯茶。

examples.english: I've been offered the job!
examples.chinese: 他们给我这份工作了！

examples.english: Can I offer you a ride?
examples.chinese: 我载你一程，好吗?

examples.english: Why don't you offer them a drink while I finish getting dinner ready?
examples.chinese: 我在准备晚餐，你招呼他们喝点东西吧。

examples.english: Unfortunately, they offered the contract to someone else.
examples.chinese: 很不幸，他们把合同给了别人。

examples.english: We have some maps of the city - would you like one?
examples.chinese: 我们有本市的地图—你要吗？

examples.english: Would you like fries with that?
examples.chinese: 要配薯条吗？

examples.english: Can I get you some coffee?
examples.chinese: 我给你倒杯咖啡吧。

examples.english: What can I get you? There's beer or wine.
examples.chinese: 要给你拿点什么吗？有啤酒和葡萄酒。

examples.english: There's plenty of food, so help yourself.
examples.chinese: 有足够的食物，自己来吧。

examples.english: Help yourself to some salad.
examples.chinese: 吃点沙拉吧。

examples.english: Have some of the pie - my Mom made it.
examples.chinese: 吃点馅饼—我妈妈做的。

examples.english: Go on, have another beer.
examples.chinese: 来吧，再喝杯啤酒。

centers.english: when you offer to help

examples.english: She was the kind of teacher who was always ready to offer advice and encouragement.
examples.chinese: 她是那种随时都会给你建议和鼓励的老师。

examples.english: I offered to help her with the dishes.
examples.chinese: 我主动提出帮她洗盘子。

examples.english: ‘Do you want me to look after the children next week?’ ‘No, but thanks for offering.’
examples.chinese: “下个星期要我帮忙看孩子吗？”“不用了，谢谢你的好意。

examples.english: Jill volunteered to go with me to the hospital.
examples.chinese: 吉尔主动提出陪我去医院。

examples.english: Will anyone volunteer to help me clean up this mess?
examples.chinese: 有谁愿意帮我把这乱糟糟的地方收拾干净？

examples.english: No one volunteered for night duty.
examples.chinese: 没有人自愿值夜班。

examples.english: The number of operations may have to be limited unless more blood donors come forward.
examples.chinese: 除非有更多的人自愿来捐血，否则只能限制手术的数量。

examples.english: None of the parents came forward to help with the school party.
examples.chinese: 没有一个家长自告奋勇为这次学校聚会提供帮助。

examples.english: The negotiations will come to an end unless someone comes forward with a new proposal.
examples.chinese: 除非有人提出新的建议，否则谈判将到此为止。

examples.english: Let me drive you to the station.
examples.chinese: 让我开车送你去车站吧。

examples.english: Let me give you a hand with that, mate.
examples.chinese: 老兄，让我帮你一把吧。

examples.english: Why don't you let me cook dinner tonight?
examples.chinese: 今天晚上不如让我来做晚饭吧。

expressions.text: can Ido something/would you like me to do something/ shall I do something

examples.english: Can I take your bag - it looks heavy.
examples.chinese: 要我帮你拿袋子吗—好像很重。

examples.english: Would you like me to mail that letter for you? I'm going into town.
examples.chinese: 要我帮你寄那封信吗？我要进城去。

examples.english: Shall I make a copy for you?
examples.chinese: 要我给你拷贝一份吗？

examples.english: ‘Can I get you anything else?’ the waiter asked.
examples.chinese: “还要给你拿点别的东西吗？”服务员问道。

centers.english: to offer money for something

examples.english: Chaldon was offered a huge salary to become team manager.
examples.chinese: 他们给查尔登出很高的薪金让他当球队领队。

examples.english: Police are offering a reward for information about the shooting.
examples.chinese: 警方悬赏奖金给提供枪击案情报的人。

examples.english: Some guy offered me £2,000 for the car. I just laughed and hung up the phone.
examples.chinese: 有个家伙出2,000英镑要买我的车，我笑笑就把电话挂了。

examples.english: Has anyone made an offer yet for the house?
examples.chinese: 有人出价买这幢房子了没有？

examples.english: Immediately after they were shown the property, they made an offer of $165,000.
examples.chinese: 他们看了这幢物业之后，立即出价165,000美元。

examples.english: I'm prepared to make you a very generous offer.
examples.chinese: 我准备给你出一个高价。

examples.english: At the auction, I bid £50 for a small antique mirror, but it ended up selling for over £200.
examples.chinese: 拍卖会上我出价50英镑竞投一面小古董镜，可它最后卖了两百多英镑。

examples.english: Baxley International said on Friday that it bid $11 million in cash and stock to acquire the Los Angeles-based company.
examples.chinese: 巴克斯利国际公司星期五表示，它将用1，100万美元的现金加股票收购这家总部设在洛杉矶的公司。

examples.english: Competition between the two companies bidding for the contract is fierce.
examples.chinese: 两家公司间投标争取这项合同的竞争很激烈。

examples.english: San Diego is asking private companies to bid against city workers to run one of the city's three water treatment plants.
examples.chinese: 圣迭戈要求私人公司投标，与市政人员争夺该市三大污水处理厂之一的经营权。

examples.english: The equipment will be auctioned off to the highest bidder the person who bids the highest amount.
examples.chinese: 这台设备将拍卖给出价最高的人。

centers.english: something that you offer

examples.english: I'll sell the car if I get a good offer.
examples.chinese: 如果有好价钱，我就把这辆车卖掉。

examples.english: Since the story ran in local papers, the family has received several offers of help.
examples.chinese: 这则报道在本地报纸上刊登以后，已有多方表示愿意帮助这家人。

examples.english: Pan Am accepted an offer to sell its African and Asian routes.
examples.chinese: 泛美航空公司接受报价，同意出售它的非洲和亚洲航线。

examples.english: How could you refuse such a fantastic offer?
examples.chinese: 这么棒的提议，你怎么能拒绝呢？

examples.english: The highest bid for the painting was £400.
examples.chinese: 那幅画的最高出价是400英镑。

examples.english: A number of companies have submitted bids to buy the supermarket chain.
examples.chinese: 有几家公司投标竞买那个超级市场连锁集团。

centers.english: to provide something that is needed

examples.english: Your bank should be able to provide financial advice.
examples.chinese: 你的银行应该能提供财务建议。

examples.english: Free parking is provided for hotel guests.
examples.chinese: 酒店客人免费停车。

examples.english: The university should provide more facilities for disabled students.
examples.chinese: 那所大学应当向残疾学生提供更多设施。

examples.english: The money will be used to provide the school with new computer equipment.
examples.chinese: 这笔资金将用于为该校提供新电脑设备。

examples.english: The company supplies fish to local shops and restaurants.
examples.chinese: 该公司向当地商铺和餐馆供应鱼类。

examples.english: The US government was accused of supplying the rebels with arms and equipment.
examples.chinese: 美国政府被指责向叛乱分子提供武器装备。

examples.english: The museum is funded by the local authority.
examples.chinese: 那家博物馆由当地管理机构提供资金。！

examples.english: They suspect that the rebels are being funded by Western governments.
examples.chinese: 他们怀疑叛乱分子得到西方政府的资助。

examples.english: The booklet offers practical advice to new parents.
examples.chinese: 小册子向新生儿的父母提供有用的建议。

examples.english: The prison now offers inmates the chance to study and take exams.
examples.chinese: 该监狱现在向犯人提供学习和考试的机会。

examples.english: The shelter offers some protection from the icy winds.
examples.chinese: 避风处对于刺骨的寒风能起些许抵挡作用。

examples.english: Sending goods by road offers greater speed and flexibility.
examples.chinese: 通过陆路运送货物更快、更灵活。

examples.english: Police officers have been equipped with batons and riot shields in preparation for tonight's match.
examples.chinese: 警察为今晚的比赛配备了警棍和防暴盾。

examples.english: We try to equip our students with the skills they will need in the world of work.
examples.chinese: 我们尽量让学生掌握未来工作中所需的技能。

examples.english: The ship is modern and very well equipped.
examples.chinese: 这艘船很现代，设备精良。

examples.english: This is one of the best equipped hospitals in the country.
examples.chinese: 这是该国设备最好的医院之一。

examples.english: Police in Britain are not usually issued with guns.
examples.chinese: 英国的警察通常不配给枪。

examples.english: Visitors are issued with identity cards to wear inside the factory.
examples.chinese: 给访客身份识别卡供他们在工厂内佩戴。

examples.english: Blankets and warm clothes will be issued to those who need them.
examples.chinese: 毛毯和暖和的衣服将分发给需要的人。

examples.english: I've asked the catering manager to lay on refreshments at the meeting.
examples.chinese: 我已让餐饮经理在会议上提供点心。

examples.english: Games and entertainment were laid on in the afternoon.
examples.chinese: 下午安排了游戏和娱乐活动。

examples.english: Can you fix me up with a bed for the night?
examples.chinese: 你能给我弄张床让我过夜吗?

examples.english: I took the car to a nearby garage, and they managed to fix me up with a new tyre.
examples.chinese: 我把车开到附近的修车铺，他们设法给我换了一个新轮胎。

centers.english: to provide a service for a particular group of people

examples.english: The hostel caters for single people who are unable to find affordable accommodation.
examples.chinese: 青年旅舍为无法找到廉价住宿的单身者提供服务。

examples.english: The market now caters mainly to tourists.
examples.chinese: 该市场现在主要面向游客。

examples.english: Children are well catered for at the Hotel Paradiso.
examples.chinese: 乐园旅馆很迎合儿童的口味。

examples.english: Cabin staff will cater to your every need.
examples.chinese: 舱务员会满足你各种需求。

examples.english: He served the community for over thirty years as a head teacher.
examples.chinese: 他担任校长，为社区服务了三十多年。
