examples.english: The new bus route will serve the villages to the west of York.
examples.chinese: 新设的公共汽车线将为约克市西面的村庄服务。

examples.english: The center was opened four months ago to serve the health needs of a low-income neighborhood.
examples.chinese: 该中心于四个月前开业，为一个低收入社区的健康需求服务。

examples.english: The nursing home provides for all the needs of the elderly.
examples.chinese: 这家疗养所会满足老人的一切需要。

examples.english: Local authorities must provide for the education of all children with learning difficulties.
examples.chinese: 地方当局必须满足全部有学习障碍的孩子受教育的需要。

centers.english: something that is provided

examples.english: We need to improve the supply of food to the area affected by the floods.
examples.chinese: 我们得增加受水灾影响的地区的粮食供应。

examples.english: The steel industry depends on a regular supply of raw materials.
examples.chinese: 钢铁工业依赖原材料的定期补给。

examples.english: The patient suffered a sudden decrease in the blood supply to part of her brain.
examples.chinese: 那位病人通往大脑某一部分的血液供应量突然减少。

examples.english: The drought is threatening the water supply in some areas.
examples.chinese: 干旱威胁着一些地区的用水供应。

examples.english: the flow of oil from the Middle East
examples.chinese: 中东的石油输出

examples.english: The civil war has severely disrupted the flow of humanitarian aid to the region.
examples.chinese: 内战已严重扰乱了向该地区提供人道主义援助的工作。

examples.english: A private car service is available from the airport.
examples.chinese: 机场提供私车服务。

examples.english: Electrical service was cut off for up to five hours in some parts of the country yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天，该国部分地区电力中断达五小时。

examples.english: The business, if properly regulated, performs a useful service for lottery winners.
examples.chinese: 这个行业如果管理得当，可以为彩票赢家提供有用的服务。

centers.english: a company or country that supplies things to people
centers.chinese: 向人们供应物品的公司或国家

examples.english: one of the world's biggest suppliers of defense equipment
examples.chinese: 世界最大的军备供应商之一

examples.english: The company is now the main supplier of educational software to schools.
examples.chinese: 该公司现在是学校教育软件的主要供应商。

examples.english: schools, colleges and other education providers
examples.chinese: 中小学、大学等提供教育的机构

examples.english: The company is now one of the regions main Internet service providers.
examples.chinese: 该公司现时是这个地区主要的互联网供应商之一。

examples.english: a leading provider of personal financial services
examples.chinese: 一家提供个人金融服务的主要机构

centers.english: to use something with another person

examples.english: We don't have enough books, so some of you will have to share.
examples.chinese: 我们书不够，所以你们有些人要合着使用。

examples.english: I have my own room, but we share the kitchen and bathroom.
examples.chinese: 我有自己的房间，但是我们共用厨房和卫生间。

examples.english: You could share a taxi with me if you like.
examples.chinese: 你愿意的话就和我同乘一辆出租车吧。

examples.english: If two adults share with two children under 16 share a room, the children stay free.
examples.chinese: 如果两个大人和两个16岁以下的小孩合住一个房间，小孩可以免费。

examples.english: Why don't we get together and pool our ideas?
examples.chinese: 我们为什么不凑在一块把大家的意见汇集一下呢?

examples.english: If we all pool our money I'm sure we'll have enough to buy her a present.
examples.chinese: 如果我们把大家的钱都凑在一起，我相信就够钱给她买礼物了。

examples.english: Eventually, Tim, Laura, and Ann moved into a shared house.
examples.chinese: 最后，蒂姆、劳拉和安搬进了一个房子共住。

examples.english: Many drug addicts become infected with HIV by using shared needles.
examples.chinese: 许多吸毒者因为共用一个针头而感染了艾滋病病毒。

examples.english: The problem with having a shared telephone is that someone else always seems to be using it.
examples.chinese: 共用一个电话有一点不好，那就是好像别人总是在用电话。

examples.english: There are four bedrooms in the house, and a large communal kitchen.
examples.chinese: 屋里有四个卧室，和一个公用的大厨房。

examples.english: The college has communal dining rooms, nurseries and clinics.
examples.chinese: 这所大学里有公共餐厅、托儿所和诊所。

centers.english: to do something with another person

examples.english: Judy and I shared the driving, so it wasn't too tiring.
examples.chinese: 朱迪和我轮流开车，所以不是太累。

examples.english: She shares the job with another woman who also has a young child.
examples.chinese: 她和另一位妇女合做这份工作，那人也有一个年幼的孩子。

examples.english: If the housework is too much for one person, why don't you take it in turns?
examples.chinese: 如果家务活一个人做太多，为什么不轮流做呢?

expressions.text: take it in turns/take turns to do something

examples.english: Everyone took turns to patrol the streets at night.
examples.chinese: 夜里每个人轮流巡逻街道。

expressions.text: take it in turns/take turns (at/in) doing something

examples.english: We took turns sitting in the front seat.
examples.chinese: 我们轮流坐前排位子。

examples.english: Reading need not be a solitary activity. Students can take turns in reading aloud.
examples.chinese: 阅读不一定只是一个人的活动，学生可以轮流朗读。

examples.english: You'll have to alternate. One of you can use the room in the mornings, and the other in the evenings.
examples.chinese: 你们俩得轮着来了，一个早上用这间房，另一个晚上用。

examples.english: The class has two teachers who alternate on a weekly basis.
examples.chinese: 这个班有两个老师，每个老师轮流教授一个星期。

centers.english: to divide something so that two or more people get a part of it
centers.chinese: 在两个人或更多人中间分配某物

examples.english: We agreed that we would share the prize money if we won.
examples.chinese: 我们说好如果赢了，奖金大家分。

examples.english: She shared the cake between the children.
examples.chinese: 她把蛋糕分给孩子们吃。

examples.english: Profits from the sale of tickets were shared out among the members of the band.
examples.chinese: 门票收入在乐队成员之间均分。

examples.english: We'll share what's left out between the three of us.
examples.chinese: 剩下的我们三个人分。

examples.english: They planned to rob a bank, split the money, and leave the country.
examples.chinese: 他们计划抢劫一家银行，把钱分了，然后逃到境外。

examples.english: He said that the land should be split between his four sons.
examples.chinese: 他说应该把土地平分给他的四个儿子。

examples.english: I think we should split whatever we get four ways.
examples.chinese: 不管我们弄到什么，我都觉得我们应该平分为四份。

examples.english: Hitler and Stalin agreed to divide Poland between them.
examples.chinese: 希特勒和斯大林协议瓜分波兰。

expressions.text: divide up something/divide something up between somebody

examples.english: We divided up the rest of the pie between us.
examples.chinese: 余下的馅饼我们分着吃了。

examples.english: Have you decided how you're going to divide up the money?
examples.chinese: 你们决定怎么分钱了吗？

examples.english: We must try to distribute the country's wealth so that we help those who need it most.
examples.chinese: 我们必须分配国家的财富，以帮助那些最有需要的人。

examples.english: The party's aim is to distribute power more evenly among the people.
examples.chinese: 该党的目标是把权力更平均地分给人民。

examples.english: The socialists are committed to redistributing wealth.
examples.chinese: 社会党承诺要重新分配财富。

examples.english: The tax will be collected nationally and the money raised will be redistributed to local authorities.
examples.chinese: 税款将由国家统一征收，所征得的钱将重新分配给地方政府。

examples.english: The British and French carved up the Ottoman Empire at the end of World War I.
examples.chinese: 第一次世界大战结束后，英国和法国瓜分了奥斯曼帝国。

examples.english: The two companies wanted to acquire the business and carve it up.
examples.chinese: 这两家公司想收购并瓜分这家企业。

centers.english: to share the cost of something

examples.english: We pay rent separately, but we share the other bills.
examples.chinese: 我们各付各的房租，但其他账单大家分摊。

examples.english: It's only fair that they should share the running costs of the car.
examples.chinese: 他们应该共同分担汽车的养护费，那样才公平。

examples.english: We decided to split the bill between us.
examples.chinese: 我们决定共同分担账单。

examples.english: The US is hoping to split the cost of developing the new plane with Japan.
examples.chinese: 美国希望和日本共同分担这种新型飞机的研制费用。

examples.english: At first, her earnings were split down the middle with her agent.
examples.chinese: 开始的时候，她的收入是和代理人均分的。

examples.english: If the wine is expensive, we can go halves.
examples.chinese: 如果酒很贵的话，我们各出一半。

examples.english: Why don't you go halves with him on the cost of the trip?
examples.chinese: 这次旅行费用你为什么不和他平均分摊呢？

centers.english: the part of something that someone gets or owns
centers.chinese: 某人所得到或拥有的部分

examples.english: If your grandfather left any money, you will get your share.
examples.chinese: 如果你祖父留下什么钱的话，你可以得到你的那一份。

examples.english: Wilson's share of the business is worth $500,000.
examples.chinese: 威尔逊在这家公司的股份值500,000美元。

examples.english: An Australian businessman has bought a 10 percent share in the project.
examples.chinese: 一名澳大利亚裔人买下了这个项目10%的股份。

examples.english: The allocation for atomic research has been doubled.
examples.chinese: 原子能研究的拨款增加了一倍。

examples.english: Schools will be given cash allocations per student.
examples.chinese: 学校将按学生人数得到现金拨款。

examples.english: Special ticket allocations were made for members of the company and their guests.
examples.chinese: 这家公司的员工及其客人获特别票额分配。

examples.english: How much is my cut going to be?
examples.chinese: 我那份是多少?

examples.english: The distributors and the wholesalers all get their cut, and this is what pushes up the price.
examples.chinese: 经销商和批发商都要赚一份，这样价格就上涨了。

examples.english: Investigators found that her cut of the profits amounted to more than 25%.
examples.chinese: 调查人员发现，她拿到的利润份额超过25%。

examples.english: The money should be shared out in equal portions between all members of the family.
examples.chinese: 这笔钱应该在家庭成员中间平分。

examples.english: Most of the profit goes to the retailer; some goes to the middleman, and the remaining portion goes to the producer.
examples.chinese: 大部分利润为零售商所赚，一部分被中间商赚了，余下的那部分归制造商。

examples.english: A major portion of the budget is spent on defence.
examples.chinese: 预算的很大一部分用于国防开支。

examples.english: Since the company's announcement of record profits, workers are demanding a bigger slice of the cake.
examples.chinese: 公司宣布创下空前的利润纪录之后，工人们要求分到更大的一份。

examples.english: By building cars in Britain, Toyota aim to win an even larger slice of the cake.
examples.chinese: 丰田公司在英国生产汽车，其目标是要争取更大的市场份额。

examples.english: China has a major stake in the project.
examples.chinese: 中国在这项工程中占有主要股份。

examples.english: She went into business by acquiring a stake in a copper mine in Australia.
examples.chinese: 她买下了澳大利亚一个铜矿的股份，从此开始经商。

examples.english: The American investor boosted his stake in the company to 15%.
examples.chinese: 这位美国投资者将自己在公司的股份增加到15%。

centers.english: things that are provided for people to use

examples.english: The 1980s saw a decline in manufacturing but a growth in services such as banking and retailing.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代，制造业衰落，而银行、零售等服务性行业发展起来。

examples.english: Will the use of private contractors improve public services?
examples.chinese: 使用私人承包商会不会改善公共事业？

examples.english: Regulation of banking and financial services was in need of an overhaul.
examples.chinese: 银行及金融业的管理需要全面改革。

examples.english: A national strike paralyzed postal services everywhere.
examples.chinese: 一次全国性的罢工令各地邮政服务瘫痪。

examples.english: Over the last twenty years, industrial action has affected a whole range of essential services.
examples.chinese: 在过去的20年里，工业行动影响了许多基础服务业。

examples.english: Many women get jobs in the service sector.
examples.chinese: 许多女性从事服务业。

examples.english: The facilities at the hotel were excellent -- tennis courts, swimming pool, several bars and a good restaurant.
examples.chinese: 那家酒店设施一流—有网球场、游泳池、几间酒吧和一家不错的餐厅。

examples.english: The company does not yet have childcare facilities on the premises.
examples.chinese: 该公司在工作场所内还没有托儿设施。

examples.english: Facilities for washing and drying clothes are hopelessly inadequate in many hostels for the homeless.
examples.chinese: 在许多为无家可归者建的收容所里，洗衣和干衣设备严重不足。

examples.english: I prefer this part of the city because there are plenty of good amenities.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢城市的这个区域，因为有许多好的生活设施。

examples.english: The town has grown, and offers many more amenities -- a new shopping mall, play areas and a variety of restaurants.
examples.chinese: 那个镇扩大了，有更多的设施—一家新建的购物中心、游乐区和各种餐厅。

examples.english: The main problems in the refugee camp are overcrowding and a lack of basic amenities.
examples.chinese: 难民营的主要问题是过分拥挤、缺少基本生活设施。

examples.english: Government ownership of utilities should mean that gas and electricity costs are kept to a minimum.
examples.chinese: 政府拥有公用事业应该意味着煤气费和电费保持在最低水平。

examples.english: Public utilities almost always make huge profits.
examples.chinese: 政府拥有的公用事业几乎总能赚取巨额利润。

examples.english: The electricity supply is less reliable in mountainous areas of the country.
examples.chinese: 在该国的山区，电力供应系统不太可靠。

examples.english: During the drought some households had their water supply cut off.
examples.chinese: 干旱时期，一些家庭的水源供应被切断了。

centers.english: to decorate something

examples.english: The children always enjoy decorating the Christmas tree.
examples.chinese: 小孩子总是喜爱装饰圣诞树。

examples.english: Tom had decorated his room with a series of photos of Naples.
examples.chinese: 汤姆用一组那不勒斯的风景照装饰他的房间。

examples.english: Before serving the pie, add a little parsley to garnish it.
examples.chinese: 馅饼端上前加些欧芹作点缀。

examples.english: Garnish the salad with tropical fruits and sautéed wild mushrooms.
examples.chinese: 用热带水果和油炸野蘑菇来点缀沙拉。

examples.english: I don't like the way they've tarted up our office. It looked better the way it was before.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢他们把我们的办公室装饰得那样俗不可耐，还是原来的更好看。

examples.english: ‘The Waggon and Horses’ used to be a really rough pub but now they've tarted it up.
examples.chinese: “马车和马”酒吧以前很粗陋，但现在他们把它装饰得很俗气。

centers.english: decorated in a particular way

examples.english: On the table was an ancient book with a decorated cover.
examples.chinese: 桌上有一本封面上有装饰的古书。

examples.english: The little mirror was decorated with shells and beads.
examples.chinese: 这面小镜子有贝壳和珠子作装饰。

examples.english: She wore a wide-brimmed straw hat decorated with colored ribbons.
examples.chinese: 她戴了一顶用彩色丝带装饰的宽边草帽。

examples.english: Sabina stood in the centre of an elaborately decorated living room.
examples.chinese: 萨比娜站在一间经过精心装修的起居室的中间。

examples.english: The whole street was decked out with flags and streamers to celebrate the wedding.
examples.chinese: 整条街上都挂满了彩旗和饰带来庆贺那个婚礼。

examples.english: Behind the door was another table, all decked out for the party.
examples.chinese: 门后还有一张桌子，为这次聚会也装饰得很漂亮。

examples.english: Rings and gems adorned the fingers of both her hands.
examples.chinese: 她的双手手指上戴满了戒指和宝石。

examples.english: The bridesmaids had adorned their heads with flowers.
examples.chinese: 伴娘们头上佩戴着鲜花。

examples.english: The walls of the church were richly adorned with carvings and pictures.
examples.chinese: 教堂的墙上装饰了许多不同的雕刻和画像。

examples.english: On the day of the festival the streets were festooned with flags and banners.
examples.chinese: 节日那天街头张灯结彩，旗帜飘扬。

examples.english: It was a comfortable enough room, but I didn't like the decor very much.
examples.chinese: 这房间是够舒适的了，不过我不大喜欢这种装潢风格。

examples.english: The hotel's decor is dark and museum-like.
examples.chinese: 这家旅馆的装潢是暗色调的，有点像博物馆的风格。

centers.english: used to decorate something

examples.english: Have you put up your Christmas decorations yet?
examples.chinese: 你把圣诞装饰品都挂出来了吗?

examples.english: The bride's mother had made all the table decorations.
examples.chinese: 新娘的母亲制作了所有的餐桌装饰物。

examples.english: The only decoration in the room was a picture above the fireplace.
examples.chinese: 这房间里唯一的装饰品是壁炉上方的一幅画。

examples.english: The building was very plain with hardly any decoration at all.
examples.chinese: 这幢建筑相当简朴，几乎没有什么装饰。

examples.english: These plants are grown mainly for decoration.
examples.chinese: 种这些植物主要为了装饰目的。

examples.english: I bought a new Christmas tree ornament - do you want to see it?
examples.chinese: 我买了一件新的圣诞树装饰品，你想看看吗？

examples.english: Thieves stole all the silver and gold ornaments from the palace.
examples.chinese: 窃贼从宫中盗走了所有的金银摆件。

examples.english: Serve the fish with a garnish of lemon.
examples.chinese: 上鱼时配一些柠檬。

examples.english: Fresh parsley is often used for garnishes.
examples.chinese: 新鲜欧芹常用作装饰菜。

examples.english: The poem had been embroidered on a pretty decorative pillow.
examples.chinese: 这首诗绣在一只漂亮的装饰枕头上。

examples.english: Many of the nature books are purely decorative, but a few are very informative.
examples.chinese: 这些讲述自然的书籍大多纯粹是摆摆样子的，但也有几本内容是很丰富的。

examples.english: A gardener comes in each week to trim the ornamental trees and bushes.
examples.chinese: 园丁每周都来修剪这些观赏性树木和灌木。

examples.english: an ornamental pond
examples.chinese: 一座观赏水池

centers.english: having a lot of decoration

examples.english: a velvet jacket with fancy buttons
examples.chinese: 一件有花哨钮扣的天鹅绒外套

examples.english: The Web site has a lot of fancy graphics.
examples.chinese: 这个网站上有许多花哨的图表。

examples.english: A pair of ornate gold candlesticks stood on the altar.
examples.chinese: 圣台上摆放了一对金质的装饰烛台。

examples.english: The ornate interior of the opera house was almost overwhelming.
examples.chinese: 这家歌剧院华丽的内部装饰几乎称得上是气势宏伟。

examples.english: Nick examined the elaborate carvings on the tomb.
examples.chinese: 尼克仔细查看墓上那些精致的雕刻。

examples.english: Elaborate murals had been painted on three of the four walls.
examples.chinese: 四面墙上有三面绘有精巧的壁画。

centers.english: someone who decorates

examples.english: We've had the decorators in all week.
examples.chinese: 整个星期油漆工都在我们家干活。

examples.english: My uncle Bill's been a painter and decorator all his life.
examples.chinese: 我叔叔比尔一辈子都是油漆工和糊墙纸工。

examples.english: They hired an interior designer to redo the entire office.
examples.chinese: 他们雇了一名室内设计师来重新装修整个办公室。

centers.english: clothes

examples.english: I need to go buy some new clothes.
examples.chinese: 我要去买些新衣服。

examples.english: The temperature should be around freezing tonight - it's time to get the winter clothes out.
examples.chinese: 今晚的气温在零度左右—该把冬季衣服拿出来了。

examples.english: My mother always made us wear our good clothes for travelling.
examples.chinese: 母亲总是要我们穿上好衣服去旅行。

examples.english: There are lots of clothes shops on Newbury Street.
examples.chinese: 纽伯里大街有许多服装店。

examples.english: You can pick up second-hand baby clothes very cheaply.
examples.chinese: 买二手的婴儿装很便宜。

examples.english: Charities have been delivering food and clothing to the disaster area.
examples.chinese: 慈善团体一直在向灾区运送食物和衣服。

examples.english: Because of the heat, officials are asking people to wear light, loose-fitting clothing and to drink plenty of water.
examples.chinese: 由于高温，官方呼吁民众穿浅色、宽松的服装并大量饮水。

examples.english: There was nothing in the chest except for a few items of clothing.
examples.chinese: 箱子里除了几件衣服什么都没有。

examples.english: I must buy something to wear at Julie's wedding.
examples.chinese: 我必须买些衣服，在朱莉的婚礼上穿。

examples.english: You're always saying you have nothing to wear, but you've got a whole closet full of clothes.
examples.chinese: 你老是说没有衣服穿，可是你有满满一柜子的衣服。

examples.english: I can't find anything to wear!
examples.chinese: 我找不到衣服穿！

examples.english: The garment industry has grown by 20% in this area in the past five years.
examples.chinese: 在过去的五年中，该地区的制衣业增长了20%。

examples.english: Only two garments may be taken into the changing room.
examples.chinese: 只能带两件衣服进更衣室。

examples.english: Enter our simple fashion quiz and win a whole new wardrobe.
examples.chinese: 参加我们简单的时装问答比赛，即可赢得全套服装。

examples.english: We have everything you need to update your business wardrobe.
examples.chinese: 为你更新全部商务服装，我们应有尽有。

examples.english: By adding a few bright buttons or belts to your old clothes you can have a new summer wardrobe.
examples.chinese: 旧衣服添加上一些色彩鲜艳的纽扣或腰带后，你就有新的夏装了。

examples.english: a shop that specializes in evening wear
examples.chinese: 晚装专卖店

examples.english: You'll find a nice range of silk ties in the menswear department on the fourth floor.
examples.chinese: 在四楼的男装部，你会找到各种各样的丝绸领带。

examples.english: The company's line of casual wear is primarily sold in large discount chain stores.
examples.chinese: 该公司的休闲类服饰主要在大型连锁折扣店出售。

centers.english: clothes that you wear together as a set

examples.english: She wore a black suit for the interview.
examples.chinese: 她穿了一套黑衣服来面试。

examples.english: Bob was wearing a business suit.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃穿着一套西装。

examples.english: The restaurant seemed to be filled with men in grey suits.
examples.chinese: 那家餐厅似乎全是穿灰色西装的男人。

examples.english: That's a beautiful outfit you're wearing.
examples.chinese: 你穿的那套衣服真好看。

examples.english: She went out and spent $200 on a new outfit for the party.
examples.chinese: 她出去用200美元买了套新衣服准备参加聚会。

examples.english: My daughter wore a witch costume in the Hallowe'en parade.
examples.chinese: 我女儿在万圣节游行时穿了女巫的服装。

examples.english: I didn't like the play much but the costumes were amazing.
examples.chinese: 我不太喜欢那部戏，但他们的舞台服装棒极了。

centers.english: special clothes worn by a group or profession

examples.english: Do you have to wear a uniform if you work at McDonald's?
examples.chinese: 在麦当劳上班一定要穿制服吗？

examples.english: I used to hate wearing a school uniform.
examples.chinese: 我过去讨厌穿校服。

examples.english: Some of the policemen walking amongst the crowds were not in uniform.
examples.chinese: 一些走在人群中的警察没有穿制服

centers.english: clothes that you wear for sport

examples.english: Don't forget to bring your swimming things when we go to Brighton.
examples.chinese: 我们去布赖顿的时候别忘记带泳装。

examples.english: I left my gym stuff in the car.
examples.chinese: 我把体操服留在车里了。

examples.english: I told the children to put on their gym kit and go outside.
examples.chinese: 我叫孩子们穿好体操服到外面去。

examples.english: Roz keeps her squash kit at the office and plays at lunchtime.
examples.chinese: 罗兹把壁球服放在办公室里，午餐时间去打球。

examples.english: The uniform of the New York Yankees is white with a fine blue stripe.
examples.chinese: 纽约洋基队穿的是白底细蓝条纹的队服。

examples.english: Charlie wasn't allowed to play because he'd forgotten his strip.
examples.chinese: 查利忘了穿队服，所以不允许上场。

examples.english: Did you pack my hiking gear?
examples.chinese: 你把我的徒步装备装入行李包了吗?

examples.english: Now that I've got all the gear, I'm ready to come out riding with you.
examples.chinese: 我现在全套装备都有了，可以和你一起去骑马了。

centers.english: clothes that used to belong to someone else

examples.english: I'm not interested in wearing other people's castoffs.
examples.chinese: 我对穿别人的旧衣服不感兴趣。

examples.english: Our mother kept a box of old castoffs and we spent hours dressing up, pretending to be princesses or pirates.
examples.chinese: 母亲有一箱旧衣服，我们把自己装扮成公主或海盗，一扮就是几小时。

examples.english: castoff clothes and shoes
examples.chinese: 旧衣服和鞋子

examples.english: The youngest child in the family usually gets all the hand-me-downs.
examples.chinese: 家里最小的孩子总是穿哥哥姐姐的旧衣服。

examples.english: This sweater is a hand-me-down from my sister, but I love it.
examples.chinese: 这件毛衣是我姐姐的旧衣服，但是我很喜欢。

examples.english: Diego wore a hand-me-down jacket, still too big for him.
examples.chinese: 迭戈穿着一件旧夹克，仍嫌太大。

centers.english: to wear a particular piece of clothing or set of clothes
centers.chinese: 穿一件或一套特定的衣服

examples.english: She was wearing shorts and a T-shirt.
examples.chinese: 她穿着短裤和T恤衫。

examples.english: Were you wearing your jacket when we got on the bus?
examples.chinese: 我们上公共汽车的时候，你穿着外套吗？

examples.english: Carolyn always wore bright colors like red.
examples.chinese: 卡罗琳喜欢穿红色等色彩艳丽的衣服。

examples.english: She wears sandals, even in the winter.
examples.chinese: 她一般穿凉鞋，即使在冬天也一样。

examples.english: I wear a lot of black.
examples.chinese: 我经常穿黑衣服。

expressions.text: in a suit/in a red dress etc

examples.english: a couple of boys in baseball caps
examples.chinese: 几个戴棒球帽的男孩子

examples.english: There was a man in a linen suit standing at the bar.
examples.chinese: 一个穿亚麻套装的男子站在吧台旁。

examples.english: That's Jenny Salton over there; she has a blue dress on.
examples.chinese: 那边是珍妮·索尔顿，她穿着一条蓝色的连衣裙。！

examples.english: Could you read this for me? I don't have my glasses on.
examples.chinese: 你能念给我听听吗？我没戴眼镜。

examples.english: ‘What was she wearing?’ ‘I think she had on a dark suit.’
examples.chinese: “她穿什么衣服？”“我想她穿了一套黑衣服。”

examples.english: Are you dressed yet? We have to leave now!
examples.chinese: 你穿好衣服了吗？我们现在得走了！

examples.english: They were all dressed in T-shirts and jeans.
examples.chinese: 他们全都穿着T恤衫和牛仔裤。

examples.english: a woman dressed in green
examples.chinese: 一位身穿绿衣服的女士

examples.english: Some of the children were dressed as soldiers.
examples.chinese: 一些孩子装扮成士兵。

examples.english: Look at you - you're all dressed up!
examples.chinese: 看看你呀—穿得那么讲究！

examples.english: Harvey arrived, dressed up in his only business suit.
examples.chinese: 哈维来了，穿着他唯一的一套西装。

examples.english: We dress down at work these days, unless we're going to a client meeting.
examples.chinese: 如今，我们上班时穿着比较随便，除非去和客户会晤。

examples.english: The old man sat on his porch bundled up in old sweaters and scarves.
examples.chinese: 那位老汉坐在门廊里，穿着旧毛衣，戴着围巾。

expressions.text: be bundled up against the cold/rain/wind etc

examples.english: Spectators, bundled up against the cold, stood and listened to the President speak for an hour.
examples.chinese: 观众穿上御寒的衣服，站着听总统演讲了一个小时。

examples.english: Anna was kitted out in her riding gear, waiting by the car.
examples.chinese: 安娜穿着赛车服在车旁等。

centers.english: to put on clothes

examples.english: Put your coat on if you're going out.
examples.chinese: 你要是出去的话，把外套穿上。

examples.english: She put on her bathrobe and went downstairs.
examples.chinese: 她穿上浴袍下了楼。

examples.english: I got dressed quickly and ran outside.
examples.chinese: 我飞快地穿上衣服，跑了出去。

examples.english: Sandra's in the bedroom getting dressed.
examples.chinese: 桑德拉在卧室穿衣服。

examples.english: If you like the shoes, why don't you try them on?
examples.chinese: 要是喜欢这双鞋，何不试一下呢？

examples.english: I tried on a beautiful coat, but it was too big.
examples.chinese: 我试了一件漂亮的外套，但是太大了。

examples.english: I took out my old cardigan and slipped it on.
examples.chinese: 我拿出自己的旧毛衣，一下子穿上了。

examples.english: The girls got out their party dresses, giggling as they slipped them on.
examples.chinese: 女孩子们拿出宴会服装，一边迅速套上一边咯咯直笑。

examples.english: She slipped on a pair of white jeans and a black sleeveless top.
examples.chinese: 她迅速穿上白牛仔裤和黑色无袖上装。

examples.english: You ought to wrap up warm -- I think it's going to snow.
examples.chinese: 你应该穿暖和些我觉得要下雪了。

expressions.text: be wrapped up against the cold

examples.english: The kids, wrapped up in layers against the cold, waddled out to play.
examples.chinese: 小孩子身上裹了一层又一层的御寒衣服，摇摇晃晃地出去玩耍。

examples.english: Most kids love dressing up.
examples.chinese: 大多数小孩子喜欢装扮。

examples.english: They were dressed up in old sheets, pretending to be ghosts.
examples.chinese: 他们裹上旧床单装鬼。

examples.english: One of the students dressed up as a rabbit and marched around campus carrying a sign.
examples.chinese: 其中一个学生扮成兔子模样，手里拿着一块标牌在校园中四处走动。

examples.english: I came in to find that my daughter had dressed herself up in my clothes.
examples.chinese: 我进屋后发现女儿穿了我的衣服闹着玩。

centers.english: to put on clothes for a special occasion
centers.chinese: 为某一特别场合穿衣服

examples.english: Do we have to get dressed up to go to this restaurant?
examples.chinese: 去那家餐馆，我们要穿得正式吗？

examples.english: It's an informal party, so you don't need to dress up.
examples.chinese: 这是非正式聚会，不必穿正式的服装。

examples.english: You don't need to doll yourself up. It's only my sister who's coming to dinner.
examples.chinese: 你不必打扮，只是我姐姐来吃晚饭。

centers.english: to put someone else's clothes on for them

examples.english: Honey, can you get the kids dressed, please?
examples.chinese: 亲爱的，给孩子们穿上衣服好吗?

examples.english: The nurses have to wash and dress the patients before the doctor comes to see them.
examples.chinese: 护士必须在医生来检查之前为病人擦洗、穿衣服。

centers.english: to take off your clothes

examples.english: ‘It's warm in here,’ said Michael, taking off his jacket.
examples.chinese: “这里挺暖和的。”迈克尔边说边脱下外套。

examples.english: Take your shoes off before you come in.
examples.chinese: 进屋前先脱鞋。

examples.english: Mom, I hate this tie. Can I take it off?
examples.chinese: 妈，我不喜欢这条领带，解：下来好吗？

examples.english: She got undressed and went to bed.
examples.chinese: 她脱了衣服去睡觉。

examples.english: Paul went into the bathroom to undress.
examples.chinese: 保罗走进浴室脱衣服。

examples.english: The boys ran up the stairs to get changed.
examples.chinese: 男孩子们上楼去换衣服。

examples.english: I'll be ready in a second, I just have to get changed.
examples.chinese: 我马上就好，换一下衣服就行了。

examples.english: Do you mind waiting while I change my clothes?
examples.chinese: 等我换一下衣服好吗?

examples.english: She changed into a sweater and some jeans.
examples.chinese: 她换上了毛线衣和牛仔裤。

examples.english: Ed went into the bedroom to change out of his work clothes.
examples.chinese: 埃德走进卧室换下工作服。

examples.english: We stripped off and dived into the pool.
examples.chinese: 我们一下子脱去衣服，跳进游泳池。

examples.english: She ran upstairs, stripped off her jeans and sweater and pulled on a dressing gown.
examples.chinese: 她跑上楼，脱去牛仔裤和毛线衣，换上睡袍。

examples.english: The women in the club screamed and clapped as the male dancers began to strip.
examples.chinese: 夜总会里，男舞蹈演员开始脱衣服时，女人们尖叫着鼓起掌来。

examples.english: ‘I'd like you to strip to the waist so I can listen to your chest,’ said the doctor.
examples.chinese: “我想要你脱去上衣，以便我能听听你的胸口。”医生说。

expressions.text: strip (down) to your shorts, underwear etc

examples.english: The prisoners were ordered to strip down to their underwear and wait for the guards.
examples.chinese: 囚犯被命令脱得只剩内衣裤，等卫兵来。

examples.english: I tore off the plastic gloves and threw them away.
examples.chinese: 我扯下塑胶手套扔了。

examples.english: James began to undress wildly, tearing his clothes off as if he was on fire.
examples.chinese: 詹姆斯开始发疯似地脱衣服，就像身上着了火似的把衣服扯掉。

centers.english: to take off someone else's clothes

examples.english: I'll get the children undressed and ready for bed.
examples.chinese: 我来给孩子们脱衣服，准备睡觉。

examples.english: Two nurses undressed the old woman and lifted her on to the bed.
examples.chinese: 两名护士给那位老婆婆脱衣服，并把她抬上床。

examples.english: One of the guards stripped the prisoner and beat him with a chain.
examples.chinese: 其中一名卫兵剥光了那个囚犯的衣服，用链条打他。

examples.english: I was taken to police headquarters where I was stripped and searched.
examples.chinese: 我被带到警察局，在那里我被剥光衣服搜身。

examples.english: The men were stripped naked and herded into a small prison cell.
examples.chinese: 那些男子被剥光衣服，赶进一间狭小的囚室。

examples.english: Molly tore off the child's clothing looking for more marks and bruises.
examples.chinese: 莫莉一下子脱去那个孩子的衣服，看看有没有更多伤痕和青肿。

examples.english: We cannot open every piece of baggage and strip search every passenger on every flight.
examples.chinese: 我们无法打开所有航班上的每件行李并光身搜查每一位乘客。

examples.english: Hicks was taken to the police station, strip searched, and put in a holding cell.
examples.chinese: 希克斯被带到警察局，光身搜查后，关进了拘留室。

examples.english: Are strip searches legal?
examples.chinese: 光身搜查合法吗？

centers.english: not wearing any clothes

expressions.text: have nothing on/not have anything on

examples.english: Don't come in yet - I don't have anything on!
examples.chinese: 别进来—我没穿衣服！

examples.english: I didn't want to walk near the windows with nothing on.
examples.chinese: 我不想光着身子走近窗户。

examples.english: He was lying on the bed, completely naked.
examples.chinese: 他躺在床上，浑身赤裸。

examples.english: The magazine was full of pictures of naked men.
examples.chinese: 那本杂志全是裸体男子的照片。

examples.english: I walked in, and Mr Tolifero was standing there buck naked.
examples.chinese: 我走了进去，托利费罗先生光着身子站在那里。

examples.english: When you're undressed, the nurse will come back and explain the procedure.
examples.chinese: 你脱掉衣服后，护士就会回来讲解步骤。

examples.english: bare feet
examples.chinese: 赤脚

examples.english: The dress tied around her neck, leaving her shoulders bare.
examples.chinese: 裙子在她脖子处用带子缚住，双肩赤裸着。

examples.english: At the front of the painting is a nude figure carrying a torch.
examples.chinese: 画的前面是一个手持火炬的裸体人物。

examples.english: On the wall was a nude drawing of her husband.
examples.chinese: 墙上是她丈夫的裸体画。

examples.english: Attitudes to nudity in films have changed in recent years.
examples.chinese: 近年来，人们对影片中裸体人物的态度有了转变。

examples.english: He showed me a beautiful painting of a nude a picture of a nude person.
examples.chinese: 他给我看了一幅漂亮的裸体画。

examples.english: He told me he cleans his house in the nude!
examples.chinese: 他告诉我他光着身子在家大扫除！

examples.english: The pictures show Collier on top of a New York skyscraper in the nude.
examples.chinese: 这些是科利尔赤身露体在纽约一座摩天大厦上的照片。

examples.english: Martin's threatened to turn up for the wedding in his birthday suit.
examples.chinese: 马丁威胁说要光着身子参加婚礼。

examples.english: A close friend who is a nudist, convinced Michelle to visit the community with him.
examples.chinese: 一位裸体主义者密友说服米歇尔和他一起去探访这个团体。

examples.english: There are naturist beaches on most of the Greek islands.
examples.chinese: 大部分希腊的岛上都有裸体海滩。

centers.english: to suit someone

expressions.gram: transitive verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: Do you think this colour suits me?
examples.chinese: 你觉得这种颜色适合我穿吗?

examples.english: Steve was wearing a red silk shirt that didn't suit him at all.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫穿了一件红色的真丝衬衫，一点也不适合他。

examples.english: Your hair suits you like that.
examples.chinese: 你这样的发型很适合你。

examples.english: That dress would really suit Annie.
examples.chinese: 那条裙子会很适合安妮穿。

examples.english: Why don't you wear that black dress? It looks really good on you.
examples.chinese: 你为什么不穿那条黑的裙子？你穿真的很好看。

examples.english: Those trousers would look really good on you.
examples.chinese: 那条裤子你穿一定很好看。

examples.english: High-heeled shoes are flattering but not very comfortable.
examples.chinese: 高跟鞋好看，但不是很舒服。

examples.english: She wore a plain black dress, quite simple but very flattering.
examples.chinese: 她穿了一件素色的黑裙子，简简单单，但非常漂亮。

centers.english: to look good with something else

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: I'm not sure that those earrings will go with your dress.
examples.chinese: 我不知这副耳环和你的裙子是否相配。

examples.english: That jacket will go really well with your blue skirt.
examples.chinese: 那件外套和你的蓝裙子一定很配。

examples.english: I love that pale blue wallpaper, but I don't think it would go with the carpet.
examples.chinese: 我非常喜欢那浅蓝色的墙纸，但是我觉得可能和地毯不协调。

expressions.gram: intransitive phrasal verb not in progressive

examples.english: That jacket and skirt don't really go together.
examples.chinese: 那件外套和裙子不是很配。

examples.english: It's funny but the yellow walls and the black floor actually go together quite well.
examples.chinese: 很奇怪，黄色的墙壁和黑色的地板竟然很相配。

examples.english: She was wearing black high-heeled shoes that matched her skirt and jacket.
examples.chinese: 她穿着黑色的高跟鞋，跟她的裙子和外套很相配。

examples.english: In the lounge everything matched; the curtains, the sofa, the carpet and the cushions.
examples.chinese: 休息室里的每一样东西：窗帘、沙发、地毯，还有靠垫，都很相配。

examples.english: I'm looking for a rug to match my bedroom curtains.
examples.chinese: 我在找一块能和我卧室的窗帘相配的小地毯。

examples.english: For every outfit, Stephanie seemed to have a handbag and shoes to match.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬妮每一套衣服似乎都有一个手提包和一双鞋子相配。

examples.english: Emily was wearing a dark green skirt and matching blouse.
examples.chinese: 埃米莉穿着一条墨绿的裙子和与之相配的衬衫。

examples.english: In the kitchen was a rustic oak table and six matching chairs.
examples.chinese: 厨房里有一张粗糙的橡木桌子和六把配套的椅子。

examples.english: A simple string of pearls will complement any outfit.
examples.chinese: 一条简单的珍珠项链配任何装束都很好看。

examples.english: Soft, creamy bed linen adds a luxurious touch and complements any colour scheme.
examples.chinese: 柔和的米黄色寝具给人一种豪华舒适的感觉，和任何色调都相配。

examples.english: She looked beautiful -- the white silk of her blouse complemented her olive skin perfectly.
examples.chinese: 她看上去很漂亮一白色的真丝衬衣和她橄榄色的皮肤十分相配。

examples.english: The brass rail sets off the wooden panelling very nicely.
examples.chinese: 黄铜的栏杆使木板饰面显得更美。

examples.english: It's a lovely dress, and a brightly coloured silk scarf will set it off perfectly.
examples.chinese: 这条裙子很漂亮，配一条色彩鲜艳的真丝围巾一定好极了。

examples.english: The colour's perfect for our bedroom - it should blend in very nicely.
examples.chinese: 这个颜色很适合用在我们的卧室—这肯定非常谐调。

examples.english: I'm looking for some pale green curtains that will blend in with the walls.
examples.chinese: 我在找一种和墙壁相配的浅绿色窗帘。

examples.english: Choose plants that will blend in with the existing garden scheme.
examples.chinese: 选购植物要和花园里本来的格局谐调。

centers.english: to not look good with something else

examples.english: That tie doesn't match your shirt.
examples.chinese: 那条领带和你的衬衫不相配。

examples.english: I felt slightly out of place, and was conscious that my jacket and trousers didn't quite match.
examples.chinese: 我觉得有点格格不入，意识到我的外套和裤子不是很配。

examples.english: That shirt doesn't go with your blue trousers.
examples.chinese: 那件衬衣和你蓝色的裤子不配。

examples.english: Pink and purple don't usually go very well together.
examples.chinese: 粉红色和紫色一般很难配得好。

examples.english: Choose bright colors, but make sure they don't clash.
examples.chinese: 选用鲜亮的颜色，但是要确保颜色之间要协调。

examples.english: That scarf clashes terribly with her green coat.
examples.chinese: 那条围巾和她绿色的外套非常不配。

examples.english: I can't wear red - it clashes with my hair.
examples.chinese: 我不能穿红色—这和我头发颜色不配。

centers.english: to fasten things together, using rope, string etc
centers.chinese: 用绳、线等把物件系在一起

examples.english: Don't forget to tie this label onto your suitcase.
examples.chinese: 别忘了把这个标签系在你的手提箱上。

examples.english: The washing line was tied to a tree.
examples.chinese: 晾衣绳系在树上。

examples.english: Saul tied one end of the rope around a large rock and lowered himself over the cliff.
examples.chinese: 索尔把绳索一端拴在一块大石头上，然后从峭壁下去。

examples.english: The package had been tied with strong green string.
examples.chinese: 包裹是用结实的绿绳捆起来的。

examples.english: If the rope is too short, tie two pieces together.
examples.chinese: 如果绳子太短，就把两根系在一起。

examples.english: When the teacher stood up, he found that his shoes had been tied together.
examples.chinese: 老师站起来时，发现他的鞋被系在一起了。

examples.english: I put the coins in a piece of cloth, tied it up and put the package in my bag.
examples.chinese: 我把硬币放在一块布里，把它扎紧，然后把这布包放在我的包里。

examples.english: Clara tied up all the books again and put the bundle under the desk.
examples.chinese: 克拉拉又把所有的书都捆好，然后把这捆东西放在书桌底下。

examples.english: Could you do up the back of this dress for me?
examples.chinese: 你能帮我把这件连衣裙的后面扣好吗?

examples.english: Do up your laces before you trip and fall.
examples.chinese: 把鞋带系好，免得绊倒。

examples.english: The bags were lashed tightly to the roof of the jeep.
examples.chinese: 旅行袋紧紧绑在吉普车的车顶上。

examples.english: The sailors made a raft by lashing tree-trunks together.
examples.chinese: 水手们把树干紧紧绑在一起做了个筏子。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb usually in passive

examples.english: The climbers were roped together for safety and proceeded cautiously.
examples.chinese: 为安全起见，登山者用绳索相互系在一起小心地前进。

centers.english: to prevent someone from escaping by tying rope around them
centers.chinese: 把某人捆住使其不能逃脱

examples.english: The soldiers tied them up and beat them.
examples.chinese: 那些士兵把他们捆绑起来殴打。

examples.english: Mrs Bennett had been tied up and left in the back of the van.
examples.chinese: 贝内特太太被绑起来丢在小型货车的后部。

examples.english: The terrorists tied the hostages to their chairs.
examples.chinese: 恐怖分子把人质绑在椅子上。

examples.english: Her horse was tied to a tree.
examples.chinese: 她的马拴在树上。

examples.english: The kidnappers had tied his hands together and blindfolded him.
examples.chinese: 绑匪把他的双手捆住，把他的眼睛蒙上。

examples.english: The hostages had been bound and gagged and left in a corner of the room.
examples.chinese: 人质被捆起来塞住了嘴巴，扔在屋子的一角。

examples.english: It was like being bound hand and foot to a torturer's chair.
examples.chinese: 那就像在刑椅上被捆住手脚一样。

examples.english: The prisoners were shackled together and forced to walk 600 miles across country.
examples.chinese: 囚犯们被一起戴上镣铐，被迫越野步行600英里。

examples.english: The farmer tethered a goat in the field and left it there for the day.
examples.chinese: 农民把一头山羊拴在田里，让它在那里待一天。

examples.english: My horse had been tethered to a post, but somehow it escaped.
examples.chinese: 我的马被拴在柱子上，但不知怎么它却跑了。

centers.english: to tie a knot in something

examples.english: Quickly tying a knot in his tie, John finished dressing and went to work.
examples.chinese: 约翰飞快地在领带上打了个结，穿好衣服然后去上班了。

examples.english: At school camp they taught us how to tie various knots.
examples.chinese: 在学校的训练营里，他们教我们打各种各样的绳结。

examples.english: Pull both ends tight, tie the tapes, then inflate the life jacket.
examples.chinese: 把两头拉紧，系上带子，然后给救生衣充气。

examples.english: He tied the rope to the tree, knotted it, and attached the other end to his car.
examples.chinese: 他把绳子系在树上，打了个结，然后把另一头拴到他的汽车上。

examples.english: Britt casually knotted a silk scarf around her neck.
examples.chinese: 布里特随意地把丝巾围在脖子上打了个结。

centers.english: to untie something

examples.english: I can't undo the string!
examples.chinese: 我解不开这绳子！

examples.english: She undid the ribbon and let her hair fall over her shoulders.
examples.chinese: 她解开丝带让头发披在肩上。

examples.english: Someone had untied the boat and it had floated away.
examples.chinese: 有人解开了系船的绳索，让船漂走了。

examples.english: It was several hours before anyone found me and untied me.
examples.chinese: 过了好几个小时才有人发现了我，给我松了绑。

examples.english: The balls of wool were all mixed up, and I couldn't disentangle them.
examples.chinese: 羊毛线团全缠在一起了，我怎么也解不开。

centers.english: to fold something

examples.english: He folded his newspaper and handed it to me.
examples.chinese: 他把报纸折叠好交给我。

examples.english: Before getting into bed, I usually fold my clothes and put them on the chair.
examples.chinese: 上床睡觉前，我通常把衣服折叠起来放在椅子上。

examples.english: Tom folded the letter in half and stuck it in his pocket.
examples.chinese: 汤姆把信对折好塞进口袋。

expressions.text: fold something into a square/triangle etc

examples.english: The napkins were folded into neat triangles.
examples.chinese: 餐巾被折成整齐的三角形。

examples.english: a pile of folded towels
examples.chinese: 一叠折好的毛巾

examples.english: Rachel folded up the ironing board and put it in the closet.
examples.chinese: 雷切尔折起烫衣板，把它放进了壁橱。

examples.english: Don't just leave your clothes on the floor like that - fold them up.
examples.chinese: 别把衣服那样子放在地板上—把它们折好。

examples.english: I turned down a corner of the page I was reading and shut the book.
examples.chinese: 我把正在看的那页书上折了个角，合上了书。

examples.english: The maid always turns down the bedclothes and places a mint on the pillow.
examples.chinese: 女仆总是把铺盖翻下并在枕头上放一块薄荷糖。

examples.english: Button up your jacket and turn the collar down.
examples.chinese: 扣上夹克，把衣领翻下来。

centers.english: a piece of furniture or equipment that can be folded

examples.english: You'll have to sleep on a folding bed in the living room.
examples.chinese: 你只好睡在起居室内的折叠床上了。

examples.english: By the window stood a large collapsible table with drawings and pencils all over it.
examples.chinese: 窗边立着一张折叠式大桌子，桌面上放满了图画和铅笔。

expressions.gram: intransitive verb not in progressive/intransitive phrasal verb not in progressive

examples.english: My umbrella folds up and fits into my handbag.
examples.chinese: 我的雨伞折起来能放进手提包。

examples.english: I want a push chair that folds easily and weighs very little.
examples.chinese: 我想要一辆折叠方便、分量很轻的婴儿推车。

examples.english: This portable bath folds up into a carrying case that is perfect for storing baby clothes.
examples.chinese: 这个折叠式澡盆可折叠成一个手提箱，正好用来放婴儿衣服。

centers.english: the straight line where something has been folded

examples.english: Cut the paper along the fold.
examples.chinese: 沿着折痕剪纸。

examples.english: She lay there in the narrow bed, her chin resting on the fold of the sheet.
examples.chinese: 她在那张小床上躺着，下巴搭在床单的褶上。

examples.english: I folded the paper back into its original creases and put it into the drawer.
examples.chinese: 我把纸按原来的折痕折回去，放进了抽屉。

examples.english: The defendant wore a blue blazer, a white shirt, and gray pants with a sharp crease.
examples.chinese: 被告穿一件蓝外衣、一件白衬衫和一条褶痕很挺的灰裤子。

centers.english: when something gets folds in it

examples.english: These trousers will crease if you don't hang them up properly.
examples.chinese: 这条裤子如果不挂好就会起皱。

examples.english: Linen is a beautiful fabric but it creases very easily and needs to be pressed regularly.
examples.chinese: 亚麻是一种很漂亮的布料，可是很容易起折痕，需要经常熨烫。

examples.english: His shirt was creased at the back where he had been lying down on it.
examples.chinese: 他衬衫背上躺着时压到的地方起皱了。

examples.english: Professor Haines finally showed up wearing a badly creased suit with stains on the front.
examples.chinese: 海恩斯教授终于来了，穿着一套皱得不成样子的衣服，而且衣服前面污渍斑斑。

examples.english: Don't put your shirts in there - they'll get creased.
examples.chinese: 别把你的衬衫放在那里，会弄皱的。

examples.english: She reached into her pocket and handed the clerk a crumpled ten-dollar bill.
examples.chinese: 她伸手从口袋里掏出一张皱巴巴的十美元纸币交给店员。

examples.english: I spent the night under a bridge, using a crumpled blanket as a bed.
examples.chinese: 我那天夜里睡在桥下面，把一块皱巴巴的毯子当床用。

centers.english: to open something that is folded

examples.english: He took out his handkerchief, unfolded it, and blew his nose.
examples.chinese: 他拿出手帕，打开来擤鼻子。

examples.english: Eileen struggled to unfold a large map.
examples.chinese: 艾琳费力地想要打开一张很大的地图。

examples.english: ‘I must lay the table,’ she said, unfolding a clean white linen tablecloth.
examples.chinese: “我必须摆餐具了。”她边说边摊开一块干净的白色亚麻台布。

centers.english: to wash your hands/face/body etc

examples.english: Harry went upstairs to wash.
examples.chinese: 哈里上楼去洗个澡。

examples.english: She was washing her hair when the phone rang.
examples.chinese: 她正洗头时，电话响了。

examples.english: Have you boys washed your hands yet?
examples.chinese: 你们这些男孩子洗过手了吗？

examples.english: He looks as if he could do with a good wash.
examples.chinese: 他看上去似乎得好好洗个澡。

examples.english: You'll feel better once you've had a wash and something to eat.
examples.chinese: 梳洗一下再吃点东西你会感觉好些的。

examples.english: You kids go wash up now - dinner's nearly ready.
examples.chinese: 你们这些孩子现在去洗洗手洗洗脸—晚饭快弄好了。

examples.english: The bathroom's on the right if you'd like to freshen up.
examples.chinese: 如果你想梳洗一下的话，浴室在右边。

examples.english: She hoped there would be time to freshen up before the interview.
examples.chinese: 她希望面试前有时间梳洗一下。

examples.english: I'll make the dinner - just give me chance to get cleaned up first.
examples.chinese: 我来做晚饭—但先给我点时间洗洗干净。

examples.english: He's upstairs in the bathroom getting cleaned up.
examples.chinese: 他在楼上浴室里洗澡。

examples.english: She went into the washroom at the airport to get spruced up before meeting the others.
examples.chinese: 她去机场的洗手间打扮整理一下再去见别人。

expressions.text: brush your teeth/ clean your teeth

examples.english: Have you brushed your teeth this morning?
examples.chinese: 你今天早上刷牙了没有?

examples.english: I cleaned my teeth, flattened down my hair, and rushed out of the door.
examples.chinese: 我刷好牙，梳平头发，然后匆匆地出门去了。

examples.english: Wipe your face. There's chocolate all around your mouth.
examples.chinese: 擦一擦脸，你嘴巴周围都是巧克力。

examples.english: Wiping his oily hands on a piece of cloth, he reached into his pocket and handed me the bill.
examples.chinese: 他用布擦了擦油腻的手，然后把手伸进口袋，递给我账单。

examples.english: Give your nose a wipe wipe it.
examples.chinese: 擦擦鼻子。

examples.english: This lotion cleanses your skin deep down, while preserving its natural pH balance.
examples.chinese: 这种洁肤液深入清洁皮肤，同时保持皮肤自然的酸碱平衡。

examples.english: It's a new conditioner. Simply shampoo your hair, towel dry, and spray it in.
examples.chinese: 这是一种新的护发素，洗净头发，用毛巾擦干后，把它喷上去就可以了。

centers.english: to wash in a bath or shower
centers.chinese: 在浴缸里洗澡或洗淋浴

examples.english: I'll just have a quick shower and get changed.
examples.chinese: 我很快洗个淋浴，换了衣服就行了。

examples.english: She decided to take a shower before dinner.
examples.chinese: 她决定晚饭前洗个淋浴。

examples.english: Is there enough hot water for me to have a bath?
examples.chinese: 热水够我在浴缸里洗个澡吗？

examples.english: I just had time to take a bath and change before we had to go out again.
examples.chinese: 我们再次出去前，我只有洗澡换衣服的时间。

expressions.text: be in the bath /be in the bathtu

examples.english: ‘Where's Barry?’ ‘He's in the bath.’
examples.chinese: “巴里在哪里？”“他在洗澡。”

examples.english: My wife was still in the bathtub when I got back from work.
examples.chinese: 我下班回来，妻子还在洗澡。

examples.english: I got up early as usual, and showered and shaved.
examples.chinese: 我像平时一样早早起床，洗了淋浴，刮了胡子。

examples.english: It's so hot there, you have to shower three or four times a day.
examples.chinese: 那里非常热，一天得洗三四次淋浴。

examples.english: Make sure you bathe the kids and put them to bed before eight.
examples.chinese: 一定要在8点之前给孩子们洗好澡，让他们上床睡觉。

examples.english: Louise loved being bathed when she was a baby.
examples.chinese: 露易丝还是婴儿时就喜欢洗澡。

centers.english: to wash a car/floor/wall etc

examples.english: I really must wash the car this weekend.
examples.chinese: 这个周末我真的得洗车了。

examples.english: When we moved in, we spent a whole day washing all the floors and paintwork.
examples.chinese: 我们搬进去时，花了一整天时间清洗所有的地板和漆面。

examples.english: The spinach leaves should be washed in cold water.
examples.chinese: 菠菜叶应当用凉水洗净。

examples.english: Where's that stuff you use for cleaning the bathtub?
examples.chinese: 你用来洗刷浴缸的东西放在哪里？

examples.english: I usually clean the windows about once a month.
examples.chinese: 我通常一个月左右清洗一次窗户。

examples.english: Dan has to mop the floor of the café every night.
examples.chinese: 丹每天晚上都要拖咖啡馆的地板。

examples.english: Martin washed the mud off his hands and scrubbed his nails.
examples.chinese: 马丁洗掉手上的泥，然后把指甲刮干净。

examples.english: Lou was on her knees, scrubbing the kitchen floor.
examples.chinese: 卢跪着刷厨房的地板。

examples.english: Scrub the potatoes, then put them in a pan of boiling water.
examples.chinese: 把马铃薯刷干净，然后放进一锅开水里。

examples.english: Wash down the walls and leave them to dry before putting up new wallpaper.
examples.chinese: 把墙壁冲洗一遍，干了以后再贴上新墙纸。

examples.english: Carol washed the van down and checked the oil and tyres.
examples.chinese: 卡罗尔把小型货车冲洗了一遍，然后检查了机油和轮胎。

examples.english: I'll just go and wash out these glasses.
examples.chinese: 我这就去清洗这些玻璃杯。

examples.english: When the bottle is empty, wash it out thoroughly before refilling.
examples.chinese: 瓶子空了以后，彻底洗干净后再灌满。

centers.english: to wash clothes

examples.english: Could you wash this shirt for me?
examples.chinese: 帮我洗洗这件衬衫可以吗?

examples.english: I seem to spend all my time washing and ironing these days.
examples.chinese: 这些天我似乎把所有时间都花在洗衣服熨衣服上。

examples.english: You ought to wash that sweater by hand.
examples.chinese: 那件毛衣要手洗。

examples.english: Don't put that dress in the washing machine - the label says it should be dry-cleaned.
examples.chinese: 别把那件连衣裙放在洗衣机里—标签上写着应干洗。

examples.english: Could you collect my suit from the dry-cleaner's?
examples.chinese: 你能帮我去干洗店取西装吗？

examples.english: Did you do the laundry this morning?
examples.chinese: 今天早上你把衣服都洗了吗?

examples.english: I had to go to the laundromat to do the washing.
examples.chinese: 我得去自助洗衣店洗衣服。

examples.english: I usually hand wash the socks and underwear, and put the rest in the machine.
examples.chinese: 袜子和内衣我通常手洗，其他衣服则放在洗衣机里洗。

examples.english: Delicate garments and woollens should be handwashed.
examples.chinese: 质地精细的衣服和毛织物应该手洗。

examples.english: ‘Where's my yellow blouse?’ ‘It's in the wash.’
examples.chinese: “我的黄衬衫在哪里？”“正在洗。”

examples.english: You'll have to wear these - your other pants are in the wash.
examples.chinese: 你只好穿这条，你其他的裤子正在洗。

examples.english: a basket of laundry
examples.chinese: 一篮刚洗好的衣服

examples.english: There was dirty washing all over the floor.
examples.chinese: 地板上到处是要洗的脏衣服。

examples.english: Let's have a look at the label on those trousers. Are they washable?
examples.chinese: 我们来看看那条裤子上的标签，能不能水洗?

examples.english: I always buy cotton clothes that are easily washable.
examples.chinese: 我总是买方便水洗的棉质衣服。

centers.english: to wash cups/plates/knives etc

examples.english: My mom always makes me wash the dishes.
examples.chinese: 我妈总是要我洗盘子。

examples.english: Can I help you do the dishes?
examples.chinese: 我来帮你洗盘子，好吗？

examples.english: If you do the cooking tonight, I'll do the washing up.
examples.chinese: 今天晚上如果你做饭，我就洗盘子。

examples.english: Who's going to wash up?
examples.chinese: 谁来洗盘子？

examples.english: The sink was full of washing-up.
examples.chinese: 洗涤槽里全是待洗的餐具。

centers.english: to wash something using water but without soap
centers.chinese: 用水而不用肥皂洗某物

examples.english: I'll just rinse the lettuce under the tap.
examples.chinese: 我就把生菜放到水龙头下冲洗。

examples.english: Rosie rinsed her mouth to get rid of the taste.
examples.chinese: 罗茜漱了口，想把味道去掉。

examples.english: He rinsed out a glass and poured himself a whiskey.
examples.chinese: 他冲洗了一只玻璃杯，给自己倒了杯威士忌酒。

examples.english: Pass me your cup, and I'll give it a quick rinse.
examples.chinese: 把你的杯子递给我，我来很快地冲洗一下。

examples.english: You'll have to soak that shirt to get the blood off it.
examples.chinese: 那件衬衫要浸泡，以便去除血渍。

examples.english: Just leave that pan to soak overnight.
examples.chinese: 就把那个平底锅泡一个晚上吧。

centers.english: not dirty

examples.english: He changed into a clean shirt.
examples.chinese: 他换了件干净的衬衫。

examples.english: I'll put some clean sheets on the bed.
examples.chinese: 我要在床上铺上干净的床单。

examples.english: A large house is difficult to keep clean.
examples.chinese: 大房子很难保持干净。

examples.english: Our hotel room was lovely and clean.
examples.chinese: 我们宾馆的客房非常干净。

examples.english: Nina keeps the kitchen absolutely spotless.
examples.chinese: 尼娜把厨房料理得一尘不染。

examples.english: He was wearing a spotlessly clean white shirt.
examples.chinese: 他穿着一件洁白的衬衫。

examples.english: She wore an immaculate grey suit and a tasteful, blue woven hat.
examples.chinese: 她穿了洁净的灰色套装，头戴一顶高雅的蓝色绒线帽。

examples.english: The house was absolutely immaculate.
examples.chinese: 那房子洁净如新。

examples.english: Every room in the house was spick and span.
examples.chinese: 那幢房子里的每个房间都十分整洁。

examples.english: We'll have the place spick and span in no time.
examples.chinese: 我们要立刻把这个地方收拾得干干净净。

centers.english: completely clean so that diseases cannot spread
centers.chinese: 十分干净，因此疾病无法传播

examples.english: Three out of five people in developing countries have no easy access to clean water.
examples.chinese: 发展中国家有五分之三的人口不易获得清洁的水。

examples.english: The department is responsible for maintaining the bedrooms and public rooms in a clean and sanitary condition.
examples.chinese: 该部门负责保持卧室和公用房间清洁卫生。

examples.english: It felt good to get away from the city and breathe in some pure mountain air.
examples.chinese: 远离城市，呼吸山区清新的空气令人感到愉快。

examples.english: The water in the lake is so pure you can drink it.
examples.chinese: 湖水非常纯净，可以饮用。

examples.english: There is concern about the purity of our tap water.
examples.chinese: 我们的自来水的纯净度令人担心。

examples.english: Cleansall kills germs as well, leaving your kitchen clean and hygienic.
examples.chinese: 万能清洁剂也能杀菌，使厨房清洁卫生。

examples.english: Meat products must always be kept in hygienic conditions.
examples.chinese: 肉制品必须始终保存在卫生的环境里。

examples.english: Red Cross officials say they are running short of disinfectant and sterile bandages.
examples.chinese: 红十字会官员称他们的消毒剂和无菌绷带快用完了。

examples.english: Giving blood is perfectly safe. All equipment is sterile, used once and thrown away.
examples.chinese: 捐血很安全。所有用具都消过毒，用后即弃。

centers.english: when you keep things clean to prevent disease

examples.english: Restaurants may be closed down if they fail to maintain minimum standards of hygiene.
examples.chinese: 达不到最低卫生标准的餐馆可能要关闭。

examples.english: Schools should have policies to ensure good hygiene in kitchen areas.
examples.chinese: 学校应当有政策以确保厨房区域卫生状况良好。

examples.english: A healthy lifestyle includes having a nutritious diet and good personal hygiene.
examples.chinese: 健康的生活方式包括营养丰富的膳食和良好的个人卫生习惯。

examples.english: The nurse cleaned and disinfected the cuts on his hands.
examples.chinese: 护士清理他手上的伤口并且消毒。

examples.english: Disinfect the toilet regularly using bleach.
examples.chinese: 定期用漂白剂给抽水马桶消毒。

examples.english: Has the needle been sterilized?
examples.chinese: 针消过毒了吗？

examples.english: Babies’ bottles can be sterilized simply by boiling them in water.
examples.chinese: 奶瓶放在水里煮就能消毒。

centers.english: to clean a room, house etc

examples.english: I clean the windows every Saturday.
examples.chinese: 每个星期六我都擦窗。

examples.english: Tony was cleaning the inside of his car.
examples.chinese: 托尼在清扫自己汽车的内部。

examples.english: How often do you clean the kitchen?
examples.chinese: 你多久打扫一次厨房？

examples.english: There was mud all over the carpet, and it took me a long time to clean it up.
examples.chinese: 地毯上全是泥，我花了很长时间才弄干净。

examples.english: I always clean my teeth last thing at night.
examples.chinese: 我晚上做的最后一件事总是刷牙。

examples.english: Make sure you clean behind the stove.
examples.chinese: 一定要把炉子后面清扫干净。

examples.english: I spent the whole weekend cleaning.
examples.chinese: 整个周末我都在打扫。

examples.english: Her husband does most of the cleaning.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫做大部分的打扫工作。

examples.english: The apartment needs to be cleaned out before a new tenant can move in.
examples.chinese: 在新房客搬进来以前，先要把公寓彻底打扫一番。

examples.english: I think it's time we cleaned out the garage.
examples.chinese: 我觉得我们应该把车库彻底打扫一下了。

examples.english: We really need to clean the refrigerator out.
examples.chinese: 我们的确需要把冰箱彻底清理一下。

examples.english: Barry spent the day spring-cleaning.
examples.chinese: 巴里用了整天时间大扫除。

examples.english: I want to spring-clean the whole apartment before Easter.
examples.chinese: 我想在复活节前把整间公寓打扫一下。

examples.english: Housework takes up most of my time in the evenings.
examples.chinese: 晚上，做家务占用了我大部分时间。

examples.english: I hate doing housework so I pay someone to do it for me.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌做家务，所以花钱雇人来做。

centers.english: to make something clean with a cloth

examples.english: The waiter was wiping the tables.
examples.chinese: 那个服务员在擦桌子。

examples.english: If you spill any paint, wipe it up immediately.
examples.chinese: 油漆溅出来的话，必须马上把它擦掉。

examples.english: Wipe up all that mess before you begin cooking.
examples.chinese: 开始做饭前，把溅出来的食物擦干净。

examples.english: She decided to dust the dining room furniture again.
examples.chinese: 她决定把饭厅的家具再擦一遍。

examples.english: A thorough cleaning includes dusting under the wardrobes.
examples.chinese: 彻底打扫包括清除衣橱下面的灰尘。

examples.english: She didn't often dust behind the pictures.
examples.chinese: 她不常清除照片后面的灰尘。

examples.english: He polished the piano until the wood shone.
examples.chinese: 他把钢琴擦得光亮。

examples.english: a polished wooden floor
examples.chinese: 擦得很亮的木地板

examples.english: If you're coming, you'd better shine your shoes and put on a clean shirt.
examples.chinese: 你要是来的话，最好把鞋子擦亮，穿一件干净衬衫。

examples.english: You should have your shoes shined before the interview.
examples.chinese: 面试前你得把鞋子擦亮。

examples.english: Those shoes need a shine to be shined.
examples.chinese: 那双鞋子该擦擦了。

centers.english: to clean something with a brush

examples.english: You should brush your jacket -- it's covered in dust.
examples.chinese: 你得刷一下外套—上面全是灰尘。

examples.english: I brushed the crumbs off the sofa.
examples.chinese: 我把沙发上的食物碎屑刷掉。

examples.english: Have you brushed your teeth yet?
examples.chinese: 你刷过牙了吗？

examples.english: Part of my job was to wash the dishes and scrub the floors.
examples.chinese: 我的一部分工作是洗碟子和擦洗地板。

examples.english: Scrub the potatoes and boil them for 5-10 minutes.
examples.chinese: 把马铃薯擦洗干净，煮5-10分钟。

examples.english: When everyone had left, Ed swept the floor.
examples.chinese: 所有人都离开后，埃德扫地了。

examples.english: Can you help me sweep up all the pieces of glass?
examples.chinese: 你来帮我把地上的碎玻璃扫干净，好吗？

examples.english: I scoured the pots and pans.
examples.chinese: 我把坛坛罐罐擦干净。

examples.english: Scour the bowl with a mixture of vinegar and baking soda.
examples.chinese: 把醋和小苏打混合后擦碗。

centers.english: to clean something with a special cleaning machine
centers.chinese: 用专门的机器清理某物

examples.english: Have you vacuumed the carpets?
examples.chinese: 你用吸尘器清扫过地毯了吗?

examples.english: You do the hoovering and I'll finish the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 你吸尘，我打扫厨房。

centers.english: someone whose job is to clean things

examples.english: We finish work at six, and then the cleaners come in.
examples.chinese: 我们6点下班，那时清洁工上班。

examples.english: a window cleaner
examples.chinese: 窗户清洁工

examples.english: My suit is at the dry cleaner's.
examples.chinese: 我的西装送去干洗了。

examples.english: Can you collect my dress from the cleaner's?
examples.chinese: 去干洗店把我的裙子拿回来，好吗？

centers.english: a tidy place/room/group of things
centers.chinese: 整洁的地方/房间/一组物件

examples.english: Andrew's apartment is always so tidy.
examples.chinese: 安德鲁的房间总是这么整洁。

examples.english: That looks a bit tidier now, doesn't it?
examples.chinese: 现在看起来较为整洁了，是吗？

examples.english: a tidy desk
examples.chinese: 整洁的书桌

examples.english: I think the least you could do is keep your own bedroom tidy.
examples.chinese: 我想你至少应该保持自己卧室的整洁。

examples.english: My job was to mow the grass and keep the garden looking generally tidy.
examples.chinese: 我的工作是割草并使花园总体看上去整洁。

expressions.text: clean and tidy/neat and tidy/nice and tidy

examples.english: We spent the morning getting the whole house clean and tidy.
examples.chinese: 我们花了整个上午把整幢房子打扫得干净整洁。

examples.english: I want to leave the place nice and tidy before we go.
examples.chinese: 我们离开之前我想把这里弄得干干净净的。

examples.english: Mrs Woodie cut the sandwiches in neat squares.
examples.chinese: 伍迪太太把三明治切成整齐的方块。

examples.english: The room was neat, though a bit dusty.
examples.chinese: 这房间挺整齐的，尽管有点灰尘。

examples.english: Billy's cottage was set back off the road, behind a neat little hedge.
examples.chinese: 比利的乡间小屋远离公路，坐落在一小片整齐的树篱后面。

examples.english: He put his clothes in a neat pile on the bed.
examples.chinese: 他把自己的衣服叠得整整齐齐放在床上。

examples.english: His jackets were arranged in a neat row in the closet.
examples.chinese: 他的外套在衣橱里排列得整整齐齐。

examples.english: I like to see everything looking neat and tidy.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢每样东西看上去都干净整洁。

examples.english: All the books were neatly arranged on the shelves.
examples.chinese: 所有的书都整齐有序地摆在书架上。

examples.english: He took off his jacket and folded it neatly on his lap.
examples.chinese: 他脱下外套，放在腿上整齐地折叠好。

examples.english: Our house was immaculate, and Mother taught us to be polite and deferential to visitors.
examples.chinese: 我们的房子打扫得非常整洁，妈妈还教我们对待客人要礼貌恭敬。

examples.english: a tiny harbour ringed with immaculate white clapboard houses
examples.chinese: 被装有白色护墙板、外观整洁的房子围绕着的小港湾

examples.english: He was dressed in an immaculate navy suit and a crisp white shirt.
examples.chinese: 他穿了一套整洁的海军服和一件挺括的白衬衫。

examples.english: tall, blond soldiers in immaculate uniforms
examples.chinese: 身穿整洁军服、身材高大的金发士兵

examples.english: Like the house, the garden was neat and immaculately kept.
examples.chinese: 和那幢房子一样，花园也给打理得干净整洁。

examples.english: Our old house, now covered with ivy, still looked pretty and well-kept.
examples.chinese: 我们的老房子虽然现在爬满了长春藤，看上去依旧漂亮整洁。

examples.english: Visitors should tour the palace, but don't forget the well-kept grounds -- well worth a visit.
examples.chinese: 游客应该去宫殿看一看，但别忘了干净整洁的庭院也值得一游。

centers.english: to make a place tidy

expressions.gram: transitive verb or intransitive/transitive phrasal verb

examples.english: If you're not going to watch the football, you can tidy your room.
examples.chinese: 如果你不看足球赛的话，可以去打扫一下自己的房间。

examples.english: I haven't had time to tidy up yet.
examples.chinese: 我还没有时间打扫呢。

examples.english: I want this whole place tidied before I get back, ok?
examples.chinese: 我回来之前希望这里已经弄整洁了，行不行？

examples.english: You can start tidying up that mess you've made now.
examples.chinese: 你现在可以开始把你弄乱的东西整理干净了。

examples.english: She hung about after work, tidying up her desk.
examples.chinese: 她下班后磨磨蹭蹭地整理自己的书桌。

examples.english: Will you help me tidy the kitchen up a bit?
examples.chinese: 你能帮我把厨房收拾一下吗？

examples.english: Come on, let's have these toys tidied away now.
examples.chinese: 来吧，我们现在把这些玩具收拾好。

examples.english: Both my sons think mothers are just here to tidy up after them.
examples.chinese: 我两个儿子都认为做母亲的就该常常替他们打扫整理。

expressions.gram: transitive verb or intransitive/transitive phrasal verb

examples.english: Make the bed and straighten up in there.
examples.chinese: 把床铺好，并把那里整理干净。

examples.english: Kelly, when you're through with your break, would you straighten the office?
examples.chinese: 凯莉，你休息之后，把办公室收拾一下行吗？

examples.english: The city's janitors went on strike, leaving thousands of workers to straighten their own offices up and empty their own trash.
examples.chinese: 该市的清洁工人都罢工了，弄得数千员工只好自己打扫办公室和倒垃圾。

examples.english: After the kids have left for school, I straighten up the house.
examples.chinese: 孩子们上学后我便收拾屋子。

examples.english: You're not leaving till you get your room straightened up.
examples.chinese: 你把自己的房间收拾好才可以出去。

examples.english: Do you want me to help clean up?
examples.chinese: 要我来帮忙打扫吗？

examples.english: Thanks for cleaning the place up -- I really appreciate it.
examples.chinese: 谢谢你把这个地方打扫干净，真的十分感谢。

examples.english: It took us two or three days to clean it all up.
examples.chinese: 全部打扫干净花了我们两三天时间。

examples.english: Every time Jasper cooked for me, he would carefully clean up all the pans and plates he'd used.
examples.chinese: 贾斯珀每次为我做好饭菜后，都会把用过的锅碗瓢盆仔细地清洗干净。

examples.english: Who's going to clear up after the party?
examples.chinese: 聚会结束后谁愿意留下来清理？

examples.english: John's offered to clear up the churchyard this weekend.
examples.chinese: 约翰主动提出这个周末去打扫教堂墓地。

examples.english: It'll take ages to clear this up.
examples.chinese: 把这里打扫干净得花上很长时间。

examples.english: It looked as if Marie had already cleared the place up.
examples.chinese: 看来玛丽好像已经把这地方打扫干净了。

examples.english: Someone's got to clear up this mess!
examples.chinese: 总得有人把这堆脏乱东西收拾妥当！

examples.english: Wait for me, I just need to clear up my desk.
examples.chinese: 等我一下，我这就把书桌理一理。

examples.english: I spend my life clearing up after the children.
examples.chinese: 我这辈子就是跟在孩子们后面打扫整理。

examples.english: Could you pick up the newspapers and magazines for me?
examples.chinese: 你来帮我收拾这些报纸和杂志行吗？

examples.english: Help me pick these things up. We have company coming.
examples.chinese: 帮我把这些东西收拾好，有朋友要来。

examples.english: I feel like I spend all my time picking up after the kids.
examples.chinese: 我觉得自己从早到晚就是跟在孩子们后面收拾东西。

examples.english: I like to get the house straight while the kids are at the youth club.
examples.chinese: 我很喜欢趁孩子们去少年俱乐部时收拾整理屋子。

examples.english: One of these days I'll get this garage straight.
examples.chinese: 这几天我要把车库收拾一下。

examples.english: I'm going to sit down quietly one day and sort my CDs out.
examples.chinese: 哪天我要静心坐下来整理CD唱片。

examples.english: I need to sort out the food cupboard, and make a shopping list.
examples.chinese: 我要把食橱整理一下，然后列出一张购物清单。

examples.english: We've got to sort out all our stuff to take home tonight.
examples.chinese: 我们要把所有东西整理一下今晚带回家。

centers.english: words for describing someone who always likes to keep things tidy
centers.chinese: 描述总是喜欢整理东西的人的词语

examples.english: I've never been very neat but my husband is just the opposite.
examples.chinese: 我不大爱整洁，可我丈夫正好相反。

examples.english: Malcolm's always been tidy, even as a kid.
examples.chinese: 马尔科姆向来就爱整洁，小时候已是这样。

examples.english: She has a reputation for being very houseproud.
examples.chinese: 她注重保持家居整洁是人所共知的。

examples.english: Elaine's houseproud ways got on his nerves, but it was better than living alone.
examples.chinese: 伊莱恩喜爱收拾房间的作风让他吃不消，但这总比独自生活好。

examples.english: Melissa is a neat freak and Doug is kind of a slob, so the two of them are always fighting.
examples.chinese: 梅利莎是个有洁癖的人，道格则是个邋遢鬼，所以他俩老是在争吵。

centers.english: someone who looks tidy

examples.english: I rang the bell, and a neatly dressed maid answered the door.
examples.chinese: 我按了门铃，一个衣着整洁的女仆来开了门。

examples.english: She was in her mid-forties, neatly dressed with a quiet air of authority.
examples.chinese: 她四十五六岁，衣着整洁，神态里带有一种不露声色的威严。

examples.english: Leonardo appeared, immaculate as ever in a dark suit and tie.
examples.chinese: 利奥纳多出现了，他身穿深色套装系领带，和往常一样显得十分整洁。

examples.english: She was always elegantly dressed and absolutely immaculate.
examples.chinese: 她的打扮从来都是高雅整洁、一丝不苟。

examples.english: A small but immaculate figure stood in the doorway.
examples.chinese: 一个身材矮小但很整洁的人站在门口。

examples.english: Ten minutes later she reappeared, immaculately dressed in a red linen tunic with matching pumps.
examples.chinese: 十分钟后她再次出现了，穿了件红色亚麻布短上衣，配了双半高跟鞋，打扮得十分整洁。

examples.english: Though she was still immaculately groomed, there seemed somehow less poise about her.
examples.chinese: 虽然她依旧打扮得十分整洁，但不知怎么好像少了些自信。

examples.english: a handsome, clean-cut man
examples.chinese: 一个英俊整洁的男子

examples.english: Where Clinton was rugged and earthy, Gore is clean-cut and preppy.
examples.chinese: 克林顿外表粗犷、衣着朴素，戈尔则是整洁而又讲究。

expressions.text: not have a hair out of place

examples.english: He sat at his desk, not a hair out of place, and turning a pencil over in his hand.
examples.chinese: 他坐在书桌旁，外表十分整洁，手里转弄着一支铅笔。

examples.english: He seemed stern and austere and never had a hair out of place.
examples.chinese: 他看上去严肃认真，而且总是打扮得一丝不苟的。

centers.english: tidy work/writing

examples.english: Gina has very small neat handwriting.
examples.chinese: 吉娜写的字细小而工整。

examples.english: Draw a rough diagram -- it doesn't have to be very neat.
examples.chinese: 画一张粗略的图表，不必画得很工整。

centers.english: place/room

examples.english: She felt uncomfortable in such a messy house.
examples.chinese: 房子里这么乱七八糟，她感到不舒服。

examples.english: He only cleans up his room when it gets really messy.
examples.chinese: 房间实在凌乱不堪的时候他才会打扫。

examples.english: My desk isn't always this messy - I've been working on a major project.
examples.chinese: 我的桌子不是一直都这么乱的——最近因为在忙一个大项目。

examples.english: Jan found the professor in a small, untidy office.
examples.chinese: 简在一间凌乱的小办公室里找到了教授。

examples.english: These drawers are so untidy - I can never find what I'm looking for.
examples.chinese: 这些抽屉这么乱一我总是找不到要找的东西。

expressions.text: be a mess/ be in a mess

examples.english: Please sit down. Sorry everything's such a mess.
examples.chinese: 请坐。不好意思，太脏乱了。

examples.english: My basement is a complete mess and has been for years.
examples.chinese: 我的地下室脏乱不堪的，已有好几年了。

examples.english: The whole house is in a mess, but I didn't have time to clean it up.
examples.chinese: 整幢房子乱得要命，可我又没有时间打扫。

examples.english: He works in a cluttered studio that looks like a mechanic's garage.
examples.chinese: 他在一间乱七八糟的工作室工作，那里看起来像机修工的车库。

examples.english: The trailer was cluttered and cramped, with barely enough room to turn around.
examples.chinese: 这活动房屋里又乱又挤，几乎没有转身的地方。

examples.english: The room was tiny, its walls cluttered with paintings and old photographs.
examples.chinese: 房间很小，墙上杂乱地挂着画和旧照片。

examples.english: The Ewells’ place is a real dump.
examples.chinese: 尤厄尔家简直是个垃圾场。

examples.english: Why don't you do something about your room - it's a dump.
examples.chinese: 怎么不收拾一下你的房间—又乱又脏。

examples.english: This place is a pigsty! Clean it up.
examples.chinese: 这地方太肮脏了！把它打扫干净。

examples.english: I don't know how you can stand living in a pigsty like this.
examples.chinese: 我不知道这样邋遢的地方你怎么能住得下去。

examples.english: My room's a total pit, but I'm too lazy to clean it.
examples.chinese: 我的房间很邋遢，可我又懒得打扫。

examples.english: Your room's an absolute tip!
examples.chinese: 你的房间乱透了！

examples.english: It was a very nice house until they moved in and turned it into a tip.
examples.chinese: 这本来是幢非常好的房子，可自从他们搬进来以后，就弄得乱七八糟了。

centers.english: person/clothes/hair

examples.english: The little children were dirty and untidy, but very happy.
examples.chinese: 小孩子们邋里邋遢的，但是非常开心。

examples.english: Her hair was messy and her lipstick was smudged.
examples.chinese: 她披头散发，唇膏也弄模糊了。

examples.english: He was comically tall and thin with a long growth of untidy beard.
examples.chinese: 他又高又瘦，有一把乱蓬蓬的长胡子，看上去很有趣。

expressions.text: be a mess/ look a mess

examples.english: I can't go out looking like this - I'm a mess.
examples.chinese: 我不能就这个样子出去—看上去很邋遢。

examples.english: When the police called, I had just got up, and my hair looked a mess.
examples.chinese: 警察上门的时候，我才刚刚起床，头发看上去一团糟。

examples.english: My parents think I look scruffy in these jeans, but I like them.
examples.chinese: 父母觉得我穿这条牛仔裤显得邋里邋遢，可是我很喜欢。

examples.english: She's wearing that scruffy old sweater again.
examples.chinese: 她又穿那件邋遢的旧毛衣了。

examples.english: Their landlady was fat and slovenly.
examples.chinese: 他们的女房东又胖又邋遢。

examples.english: The aide was hired to keep the governor's slovenly brother out of the public eye.
examples.chinese: 雇用这个助手是为了不让州长的邋遢弟弟受到公众的注意。

examples.english: Jo's such a slob - how can you live like that?
examples.chinese: 乔是个如此不修边幅的人—一个人怎么可以这样生活的？

examples.english: If you keep dressing like a slob, no one's ever going to ask you for a date.
examples.chinese: 如果你还是这样不修边幅，没有人会邀你去约会。

examples.english: Hoskins beard was tangled and unkempt.
examples.chinese: 霍斯金的胡子缠在一起，乱糟糟的。

examples.english: She used to dress so neatly, but now her hair and clothes had become unkempt and dirty.
examples.chinese: 她以前穿着打扮非常整洁，可现在她的头发和衣服又脏又乱。

examples.english: He looked dusty, disheveled, and very tired.
examples.chinese: 他看上去灰尘满面，衣冠不整，疲累不堪。

examples.english: The actress was found disheveled and confused in a Los Angeles back yard.
examples.chinese: 那女演员在洛杉矶一户人家的后院里被发现时，衣冠不整，神情恍惚。

examples.english: She was conscious of her rather dishevelled appearance.
examples.chinese: 她意识到自己相当衣冠不整。

examples.english: A rather bedraggled crowd waited outside in the pouring rain.
examples.chinese: 一群满身泥污的人在倾盆大雨中在外面等着。

examples.english: The children walked along the path, looking miserable and bedraggled after the storm.
examples.chinese: 孩子们走在小道上，暴风雨淋得他们浑身湿透，看上去狼狈极了。

examples.english: Forman was wearing a rumpled sweatsuit and a three-day beard.
examples.chinese: 福曼穿了一件皱巴巴的运动服，三天没有刮过胡子了。

examples.english: Her dress was as rumpled as if she'd slept in it.
examples.chinese: 她的裙子皱巴巴的，好像她穿着它睡过觉似的。

centers.english: to make a place messy

examples.english: Eric, you're making a mess - I hope you're planning to clean it up.
examples.chinese: 埃里克，看你弄得一团糟—我希望你正打算把这里打扫干净。

examples.english: You can bake some cookies if you promise not to make a mess in the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 你可以做些甜饼，只要你能保证不把厨房弄得乱七八糟。

examples.english: Don't mess up the living room - we have company coming tonight.
examples.chinese: 不要把客厅弄乱—晚上我们有客人来。

examples.english: Who's messed up my nice clean kitchen?
examples.chinese: 谁把我整洁的厨房弄脏了？

examples.english: Toys cluttered the nursery floor.
examples.chinese: 托儿所的地板上杂七杂八地堆满了玩具。

examples.english: I don't want your old newspapers and magazines cluttering up the house.
examples.chinese: 我不想看到你的旧报纸、旧杂志堆得家里到处都是。

examples.english: All the available space around her computer is cluttered with papers.
examples.chinese: 她电脑周围可用的地方都堆满了报纸。

examples.english: His house was cluttered up with the things he had collected.
examples.chinese: 他家里堆满了他搜集来的东西。

centers.english: when things are spread around in a messy way

examples.english: We spent the morning tidying up the mess after the party.
examples.chinese: 聚会后一片狼藉，我们花了一个上午来清理。

examples.english: There were cups and ashtrays everywhere - what a mess!
examples.chinese: 到处都是杯子和烟灰缸—多乱啊！

examples.english: We love having our grandchildren visit, but they always leave such a mess for us to clean up.
examples.chinese: 我们很乐意孙子们来玩，可他们总会弄得一团糟让我们来收拾。

examples.english: We've just moved into the new office and I've no idea where anything is - it's chaos!
examples.chinese: 我们刚刚搬进新的办公室，我不知道东西都放在哪儿—真混乱！

examples.english: I arrived home unexpectedly and found the house in chaos.
examples.chinese: 我突然回家，发现家里一片凌乱。

examples.english: It seemed impossible for her to keep the house free of clutter.
examples.chinese: 她不把房子弄乱好像是不可能的。

examples.english: On the dresser a clutter of compacts, rouges, and lipsticks lie half open.
examples.chinese: 梳妆台上放了一堆化妆粉盒、胭脂和唇膏，盖子都是半开着的。

examples.english: I'd invite you in, but my place is a disaster.
examples.chinese: 我想邀请你进来的，可是我的房间乱得要命。

examples.english: The kids room is always a disaster area.
examples.chinese: 孩子们的房间总是乱得要命。

centers.english: fashionable

examples.english: The store sells fashionable clothes at prices you can afford.
examples.chinese: 这家商店出售时髦的服装，价格你能够接受。

examples.english: a style of painting that was fashionable in the 1930s
examples.chinese: 一种20世纪30年代时流行的绘画风格

examples.english: Kate spent her summers in Cape Cod working in a fashionable resort.
examples.chinese: 凯特夏天到科德角的一个时髦的度假胜地去打工。

examples.english: They recently opened a cafe on Manhattan's fashionable East Side.
examples.chinese: 他们最近在曼哈顿时髦的东区开了一家咖啡馆。

examples.english: He was wearing these really cool sunglasses.
examples.chinese: 他戴着副很酷的墨镜。

examples.english: Many young people start smoking because they think it looks cool.
examples.chinese: 很多年轻人开始吸烟是因为觉得这样看上去很酷。

examples.english: one of the hot young writers of the decade
examples.chinese: 这十年来很受欢迎的年轻作家之一

examples.english: They're supposed to be the hottest thing since the Beatles.
examples.chinese: 据说他们是自披头士乐队以后最红极一时的乐队。

examples.english: a trendy street market in the centre of Paris
examples.chinese: 位于巴黎市中心的时髦街市

examples.english: Delgado predicts that blonde hair will become trendy this summer.
examples.chinese: 德尔加多预测今年夏天金发将成为时尚。

examples.english: Trendy bars and restaurants are opening and inexpensive apartments in the area are getting hard to find.
examples.chinese: 时髦酒吧和餐厅不断开张，这一地区便宜的住房是越来越难找了。

examples.english: She was wearing a stylish black woollen dress.
examples.chinese: 她穿着一件时髦的黑色羊毛衫。

examples.english: stylish modern furniture
examples.chinese: 时尚的现代家具

examples.english: They live in a chic apartment overlooking the Seine.
examples.chinese: 他们居住在俯瞰塞纳河的时髦套间里。

examples.english: a chic restaurant in Boston
examples.chinese: 波士顿的一家时髦餐馆

examples.english: The east side of the city has become very chic in the past few years.
examples.chinese: 过去的几年里该城的东区已发展得很时尚高雅了。

examples.english: Alex Garland's cult novel ‘The Beach’ was later made into a film starring Leonardo di Caprio.
examples.chinese: 亚历克斯·加兰的小说《海滩》被小众崇拜，后来被改编成电影，由莱奥纳多·迪卡普里奥主演。

examples.english: 60s cult band The Velvet Underground
examples.chinese: 60年代的小众时尚乐队“地下丝绒”

examples.english: Frankie Knuckles is a cult figure in dance music.
examples.chinese: 弗朗姬·纳克尔兹是舞蹈音乐领域的小众时尚人物。

examples.english: Purple seems to be in this year.
examples.chinese: 紫色似乎是今年的流行色。

examples.english: Gstaad is the in place to go skiing in winter.
examples.chinese: 格施塔德是冬季滑雪的时髦地方。

examples.english: Cycling to work has become the in thing to do.
examples.chinese: 骑自行车上班已成为时髦的事。

examples.english: The South Side is becoming a really hip place to live.
examples.chinese: 南区已成为很时尚的居住区。

examples.english: I hate old people who dress like teenagers and think they're hip.
examples.chinese: 我很讨厌老年人穿成青少年模样，还自以为很赶得上潮流。

examples.english: In four to five years, this will be a happening film festival.
examples.chinese: 四到五年内这个电影节就将成为时髦。

examples.english: The town's OK, but not what you'd call a happening place.
examples.chinese: 这个城镇挺不错，但算不上是个叫得响的地方。

centers.english: to be fashionable

examples.english: Latin music is very much in fashion.
examples.chinese: 拉丁音乐目前很流行。

examples.english: Surprisingly, flared trousers are in fashion again.
examples.chinese: 令人吃惊的是，喇叭裤又流行起来了。

examples.english: Country cottage furniture has been in fashion for a long time now.
examples.chinese: 乡间小屋式家具现已流行了很长一段时间。

examples.english: I thought it looked ugly, but Iris said white suits were the fashion so I tried it on.
examples.chinese: 我觉得那套套装很难看，可是艾丽斯说它是时尚，所以我就穿上试了试。

examples.english: Wearing coats hanging off one shoulder is the fashion among schoolchildren at the moment.
examples.chinese: 穿着外套挂下一只肩来是眼下学生们的时尚。

expressions.text: be the latest thing/be the in thing

examples.english: When I was growing up, the video game ‘Pong’ was the latest thing.
examples.chinese: 我小时候一种叫“电子乒乓游戏”的电子游戏最流行。

examples.english: I know cigars are the in thing, but you'll never see me smoke one.
examples.chinese: 我知道抽雪茄近来很时髦，但我决不会去抽的。

expressions.text: be the latest thing in something

examples.english: Herbert's house looks like a factory , but it's the latest thing in modern architecture.
examples.chinese: 赫伯特的房子看上去像个厂房—这是现代建筑中最流行的设计了。

expressions.text: be the in thing to do

examples.english: Having a holiday in Ibiza seems to be the in thing to do at the moment.
