examples.chinese: 去伊维萨岛度假眼下似乎成了件时髦的事。

examples.english: Long skirts are in at the moment.
examples.chinese: 长裙目前很流行。

examples.english: Before the war, ragtime was all the rage in the dancehalls.
examples.chinese: 战前，雷格泰姆音乐在舞厅里是非常流行的。

examples.english: Buying a cabin in the mountains may be all the rage at the moment, but is it really a sound investment?
examples.chinese: 在山区里买一幢小木屋眼下也许十分流行，但这个投资真的稳健吗？

examples.english: Do you remember when New Wave music was in vogue?
examples.chinese: 你记得新浪潮音乐是什么时候流行的吗?

examples.english: His photographs, stark and sometimes shocking, are very much in vogue with young intellectuals.
examples.chinese: 他拍的照片质朴无华，有时令人震惊，在青年知识分子中非常风行。

centers.english: ways of saying that something becomes fashionable

examples.english: When did baseball caps come into fashion?
examples.chinese: 棒球帽是什么时候开始流行起来的?

examples.english: When mini-skirts first came into fashion, women said they'd never wear them.
examples.chinese: 迷你裙刚开始流行的时候，女人们都说决不会穿。

examples.english: Short haircuts for men went out for a time, and then they came back into fashion.
examples.chinese: 男人留短发曾一度过时，后来又流行起来了。

examples.english: Skateboarding first came in during the early 1980s.
examples.chinese: 滑板最早流行于20世纪80年代初期。

examples.english: New fashions seem to come in and go out again much more quickly these days.
examples.chinese: 如今新时尚的更替似乎快多了。

examples.english: Who'd have thought platform soles would ever make a comeback?
examples.chinese: 谁料得到厚鞋底还会重新流行起来呢？

examples.english: Games like ‘Ludo’ and ‘Snakes and Ladders’ are really making a comeback.
examples.chinese: 像“鲁多”和“蛇爬梯子”这样的游戏的确又流行起来了。

centers.english: to make something fashionable

examples.english: Young backpackers set the trend, and now people of all ages are looking for cheap ways to travel around Southeast Asia.
examples.chinese: 年轻的背包旅行者开创了新风尚，现在各种年龄的人都在寻找便宜的途径去东南亚地区旅行。

examples.english: To save the planet we must set the trend of caring for the environment.
examples.chinese: 为了拯救地球，我们必须树立保护环境的风尚。

centers.english: fashionable people

examples.english: This is the latest style of hat worn by fashionable women in Milan.
examples.chinese: 这是米兰时髦女士戴的最时尚的帽子。

examples.english: I've never been very fashionable. I'd rather wear what feels comfortable.
examples.chinese: 我从来不太喜欢赶时髦，宁愿穿感觉舒适的衣服。

examples.english: stylish South Beach cafés filled with trendy young couples
examples.chinese: 坐满了赶时髦年轻夫妇的时尚的南部海滩咖啡馆

examples.english: She only talks like that because she wants to sound trendy.
examples.chinese: 她用那种腔调说话，只因为她想听起来显得时髦。

examples.english: a sophisticated woman whose friends included many rich and famous people
examples.chinese: 一位高雅时髦的女子，她的朋友中许多都是富人和名人

examples.english: a play that will appeal to a sophisticated audience
examples.chinese: 一部吸引高雅时髦观众的戏剧

examples.english: a new designer who will appeal to fashion victims everywhere
examples.chinese: 一位迎合各地盲目追求时尚的人的新出道的设计师

centers.english: fashionable activity, product, style etc
centers.chinese: 时尚的活动、产品、风格等

examples.english: I always find it hard to keep up with the latest fashions.
examples.chinese: 我一直觉得很难赶上最新款式。

examples.english: changing fashions in popular music
examples.chinese: 流行音乐不断变化的时尚

examples.english: Who started this fashion for wearing old army clothes?
examples.chinese: 是谁首先开始穿旧军服这种时尚的？

examples.english: A lot of the students here don't think for themselves, they just follow the latest trends.
examples.chinese: 这里的许多学生不会自己思考，只会赶时髦。

examples.english: Today we'll be examining the latest trends in kitchen design
examples.chinese: 今天我们来探讨一下厨房设计的最新潮流。

examples.english: A new fitness craze from Australia is rapidly catching on.
examples.chinese: 澳大利亚传来的一种健身热正迅速传开。

examples.english: To no one's surprise, the macarena proved to be a short-lived fad.
examples.chinese: 玛卡莲娜舞风行一时也过时得快，这谁也没有感到意外。

examples.english: The latest thing is to wear only white clothes.
examples.chinese: 最近流行只穿白衣服。

examples.english: No matter how expensive, he always has to do the latest thing.
examples.chinese: 不管花多少钱，他总是要赶时髦。

examples.english: I can remember when eight-track tapes were the latest thing in music.
examples.chinese: 我还记得八音轨磁带是音响界内时髦事的时候。

examples.english: People's fondness for wearing black and other dark colours was a vogue I never really liked.
examples.chinese: 人们爱穿黑色和其他深色的时尚我从来都不大喜欢。

examples.english: a vogue for the paintings of Claude Lorraine
examples.chinese: 喜爱克劳德·洛兰的绘画的时尚

centers.english: the business of making and selling fashionable clothes
centers.chinese: 制作和销售时装的行业

examples.english: He's one of the best-known designers in the world of fashion.
examples.chinese: 他是时装界最著名的设计师之一。

examples.english: a fashion designer
examples.chinese: 时装设计师

examples.english: a fashion show
examples.chinese: 时装表演

centers.english: not fashionable

examples.english: It seems like all the clothes I buy are out of fashion by the time I wear them.
examples.chinese: 好像我买的所有衣服到我穿上的时候就都已过时了。

examples.english: Rock'n'Roll began in the fifties and has never really gone out of fashion.
examples.chinese: 摇滚乐始于50年代，而且从未真正过时。

examples.english: Jogging went out when it was found to be harmful for the joints.
examples.chinese: 当人们发现慢跑对关节有害时，它就不再流行了。

examples.english: I can't believe you're wearing those shoes -- they went out years ago!
examples.chinese: 真不敢相信你还在穿这种鞋子，很多年前就不再流行了！

examples.english: She lives in an unfashionable part of West London.
examples.chinese: 她住在伦敦西区一处旧式的城区。

examples.english: a really uncool place for a holiday
examples.chinese: 一个很不时髦的度假地

examples.english: Nowadays it's considered very uncool to wear fur.
examples.chinese: 如今穿毛皮衣服被认为很落伍。

examples.english: The trouble with high fashion clothes is that they date very quickly.
examples.chinese: 流行时装的问题是它们过时得非常快。

examples.english: Certain styles of music will never date, and will always be popular.
examples.chinese: 有些音乐风格永远不会过时，总是广受欢迎。

examples.english: I loved that album when I bought it a few years ago but it sounds really dated today.
examples.chinese: 几年前我买下这张专辑时是很喜欢它的，但是如今听起来很过时了。

examples.english: The production was excellent but the costumes looked dated.
examples.chinese: 制作极佳，但服装看上去过时了。

centers.english: dirty

examples.english: Look how dirty your hands are!
examples.chinese: 看看你的手多脏！

examples.english: Take off those dirty jeans.
examples.chinese: 把那条脏牛仔裤脱掉。

examples.english: We were hot and dirty after working in the garden all afternoon.
examples.chinese: 在花园里干了一整个下午的活之后，我们又热又脏。

examples.english: Do you have any dirty clothes you need me to wash?
examples.chinese: 你有什么脏衣服需要我洗吗？

examples.english: How did the floor get so dirty?
examples.chinese: 地板怎么弄得这样脏？

examples.english: Your shoes are really muddy - take them off before you come in.
examples.chinese: 你的鞋子沾满了烂泥，把它们脱了再进来。

examples.english: They moved slowly along the muddy footpath.
examples.chinese: 他们沿着泥泞小道缓慢行进。

examples.english: She left a trail of muddy footprints behind her.
examples.chinese: 她身后留下一串泥污的脚印。

examples.english: The room was dark and dusty.
examples.chinese: 房间里黑暗暗的，积满了灰尘。

examples.english: dusty shelves
examples.chinese: 布满灰尘的架子

examples.english: The journal was dusty and beginning to fall apart.
examples.chinese: 这本杂志积满了灰尘，已开始散架了。

examples.english: greasy pots and pans
examples.chinese: 油腻的锅碗瓢盆

examples.english: Dick wiped his hands on a greasy rag.
examples.chinese: 迪克在一块油腻的破布上抹手。

examples.english: Her long greasy hair hung down to her shoulders.
examples.chinese: 她那油腻腻的长发披落在肩头。

examples.english: He blew his nose with a grubby handkerchief.
examples.chinese: 他用一块脏手帕擤鼻子。

examples.english: Her coat was grubby and one of the sleeves was torn.
examples.chinese: 她的外套很脏，一个袖子也撕破了。

examples.english: From his back pocket Robert took out a grubby scrap of paper.
examples.chinese: 罗伯特从后边口袋里掏出一小片脏纸片。

examples.english: Chris was in a grimy apron, sweeping up.
examples.chinese: 克丽丝穿了件肮脏的围裙进行打扫。

examples.english: The whole town was grimy from smoke and coal-dust.
examples.chinese: 整个小镇都因烟雾和煤尘飞扬而肮脏不堪。

examples.english: It was difficult to see through the grimy windows of the cafe.
examples.chinese: 这家小餐馆的窗户上积满了灰尘，很难通过它看出去。

examples.english: Don't wear your best shoes -- you'll only get them all mucky.
examples.chinese: 不要穿你最好的鞋—你只会把它弄得肮脏不堪。

examples.english: The cafeteria was self-service, and guests had to carry their food on little plastic trays to mucky tables.
examples.chinese: 这是家自助餐厅，顾客得自己把食物放在塑料小托盘里端到肮脏的桌子上。

centers.english: very dirty

examples.english: The inside of the oven was filthy.
examples.chinese: 烤箱的内壁很脏。

examples.english: We didn't go swimming because the water looked filthy.
examples.chinese: 我们没去游泳，因为那水看来太脏了。

examples.english: filthy sheets
examples.chinese: 污秽的床单

examples.english: You ought to wash that sweatshirt - it's absolutely filthy.
examples.chinese: 你该洗洗那件长袖运动衫了，它脏得不像话了。

examples.english: the foul air of the factory
examples.chinese: 那家工厂的污浊空气

examples.english: A foul haze of pollution hung over the city.
examples.chinese: 城市上空悬浮着一层污染形成的肮脏烟雾。

examples.english: Dalmer lived in a squalid little room above a shop.
examples.chinese: 戴尔默居住在一家小商店楼上的一间极脏的小房间里。

examples.english: Her childhood was spent in the squalid slums east of the city.
examples.chinese: 她的童年是在城市东部的肮脏贫民窟内度过的。

examples.english: After the squalid conditions of the refugee camps even this place seems preferable.
examples.chinese: 在难民营的肮脏环境下生活过后，就连这个地方似乎也不算太差了。

centers.english: dirty and bad for your health
centers.chinese: 航脏的并对健康有害的

examples.english: It is unhygienic to store raw meat at that temperature.
examples.chinese: 在那种温度下存放生肉是不卫生的。

examples.english: Hospital cleaners were criticized for the unhygienic conditions of the central kitchens.
examples.chinese: 医院清洁工因中央厨房的卫生条件不佳而受到批评。

examples.english: Sayers said that if he's elected his administration will make a priority of cleaning up the region's polluted rivers.
examples.chinese: 塞耶斯说如果他当选，他领导的政府将把清理该地区的受污染河流列为优先处理的事。

examples.english: Central London is the most polluted spot in Britain.
examples.chinese: 伦敦市中心是全英国受污染最严重的地区。

examples.english: Large parts of the Mediterranean are still polluted with toxic waste.
examples.chinese: 地中海的大部分海域仍受到有毒废弃物的污染。

examples.english: The air was heavily polluted with exhaust fumes.
examples.chinese: 这里的空气被废气严重污染了。

examples.english: contaminated drinking water
examples.chinese: 受污染的饮用水

examples.english: Several people became ill after eating hamburger meat contaminated with the E.coli bacteria.
examples.chinese: 有几个人在食用了受大肠杆菌污染的汉堡包肉之后生病了。

examples.english: The soil around the plant is heavily contaminated.
examples.chinese: 该厂周围的土壤受到严重污染。

examples.english: Amnesty claims the prisoners are being kept in overcrowded and insanitary conditions.
examples.chinese: 大赦国际声称这些囚犯的关押条件过于拥挤，很不卫生。

centers.english: to make something dirty

examples.english: Try not to get the floor dirty.
examples.chinese: 别弄脏地板。

examples.english: I don't want to get my new shoes dirty.
examples.chinese: 我不想把新鞋弄脏了。

examples.english: You can borrow my gloves, but please try not to dirty them.
examples.chinese: 你可以借我的手套，不过请尽量不要把它们弄脏。

examples.english: As he stood on the pavement, muddy water splashed up and dirtied his trousers.
examples.chinese: 他站在人行道上时，泥浆水溅起来弄脏了他的裤子。

examples.english: The baby had soiled her diaper again.
examples.chinese: 婴儿又弄脏尿布了。

examples.english: His shirtfront was soiled with blood and his hair was wild.
examples.chinese: 他的衬衫前胸沾着血迹，而且头发蓬乱。

examples.english: Many of the pages had been soiled by the old man's dirty fingers.
examples.chinese: 许多书页都被老人的脏手指弄脏了。

centers.english: to make something dirty and dangerous
centers.chinese: 把某物弄脏并使其变得危险

examples.english: An investigation revealed that the mine was polluting both the air and the groundwater.
examples.chinese: 调查显示该煤矿污染了空气和地下水。

examples.english: The company is charged with polluting the River Mersey by allowing crude oil to enter the river.
examples.chinese: 该公司因任由其原油流入默西河对其造成污染而遭检控。

examples.english: The factory explosion, which polluted the surrounding area with dioxin, was reportedly caused by negligence.
examples.chinese: 据报道，该工厂发生的爆炸事故是因疏忽造成的，这次事故使工厂附近地区受到二噁英污染。

examples.english: Lead pipes can contaminate drinking water.
examples.chinese: 铅管会污染饮用水。

examples.english: The food was contaminated during the production process.
examples.chinese: 这食物在生产过程中受到了污染。

examples.english: contamination of air, food and water
examples.chinese: 空气、食物和水的污染

centers.english: something that makes things dirty

examples.english: Why is there dirt all over the back seat of the car?
examples.chinese: 为什么汽车后座上到处是尘垢？

examples.english: She swept the dirt off the back porch.
examples.chinese: 她把后门廊上的灰尘扫掉。

examples.english: He took off his glasses, which were covered with dirt.
examples.chinese: 他摘下沾满灰尘的眼镜。

examples.english: The rooms were cleaned until every speck of dirt and grit was gone.
examples.chinese: 那些房间打扫得一尘不染。

examples.english: Max brushed the dust off his coat.
examples.chinese: 马克斯把外套上的灰尘刷去。

examples.english: There was a thick layer of dust on the furniture.
examples.chinese: 家具上有一层厚厚的灰。

examples.english: There's mud all over the carpet.
examples.chinese: 地毯上到处是泥土。

examples.english: Hayley scraped the dried mud off her boots.
examples.chinese: 海利把干泥从皮靴上刮去。

examples.english: Their expensive riding jackets were covered in mud.
examples.chinese: 他们昂贵的骑马服上全是烂泥。

examples.english: Industrial pollution has killed much of the river's wildlife.
examples.chinese: 工业污染把这条河中的许多野生生物都毒死了。

examples.english: Pollution from cars is the main cause of global warming.
examples.chinese: 汽车尾气污染是造成全球性气候变暖的主要原因。

examples.english: The convention, signed by the six states bordering the Black Sea, aims to reduce current pollution levels.
examples.chinese: 黑海周边六国签署的这份公约旨在降低目前的污染程度。

examples.english: I'll just clean the muck off the windscreen and wing mirrors.
examples.chinese: 我这就把挡风玻璃和后视镜上的尘垢擦掉。

examples.english: His hands and fingernails were filthy, his face and legs covered in muck.
examples.chinese: 他的双手和指甲肮脏不堪，脸上腿上沾满了污垢。

examples.english: On one wall of the entryway hangs a large oil painting, covered with grime.
examples.chinese: 通道的一面墙上挂着一幅大型油画，画上布满了污垢。

examples.english: His hands were black with grime from working on the car.
examples.chinese: 他修车弄得双手满是墨黑的污垢。

centers.english: a mark on something that spoils its appearance

examples.english: There are marks on the door where the cat has scratched it.
examples.chinese: 门上猫抓过的地方留下了痕迹。

examples.english: Hot cups of tea can make marks on polished tables.
examples.chinese: 热茶杯可能会在磨光的桌面上留下烫痕。

examples.english: How did you get that dirty mark on your T-shirt?
examples.chinese: 你的T恤衫是怎么弄上那块污迹的？

examples.english: His shoes had left dirt marks across the carpet.
examples.chinese: 他的鞋在地毯上留下污迹。

examples.english: I can't get this stain out of the carpet.
examples.chinese: 我无法把这片污迹从地毯上洗掉。

examples.english: Salt is the best cure for a red wine stain.
examples.chinese: 用盐来清除红葡萄酒污迹是最有效的办法。

examples.english: She pushed the crumpled, stained sheets into the washing-machine.
examples.chinese: 她把又皱又有污迹的被单塞进洗衣机。

examples.english: His clothes were torn and stained with blood.
examples.chinese: 他的衣服被撕破了，还染有血迹。

examples.english: Detectives found a few spots of blood on the carpet.
examples.chinese: 侦探在地毯上发现了一些血迹。

examples.english: The letter was covered in small ink spots, as though his hand had been shaking as he wrote it.
examples.chinese: 信上满是一滴滴的墨水痕迹，仿佛他在写这封信的时候，他的手一直在颤抖。

examples.english: There's a damp patch under the window.
examples.chinese: 窗下有一块潮湿的斑迹。

examples.english: Patches of grease covered the kitchen walls.
examples.chinese: 厨房墙上油迹斑斑。

examples.english: You can't hand your homework in with those smudges all over it.
examples.chinese: 你不能把这样满是污迹的家庭作业交上去。

examples.english: Ella had a smudge of green paint on her cheek.
examples.chinese: 埃拉脸上有一块绿漆的污迹。

centers.english: to make a mark

examples.english: The blackberry juice had stained their clothes and fingers.
examples.chinese: 黑莓汁沾污了他们的衣服和手指。

examples.english: She hoped the blood from the cut on her arm would not stain her blouse.
examples.chinese: 她希望手臂上伤口流出的血不要染污了她的衬衫。

examples.english: Put the lid on your pen so it doesn't mark the tablecloth.
examples.chinese: 把钢笔套套好，这样就不会沾污桌布了。

expressions.text: leave a mark/leave a stain on

examples.english: The children walked through the kitchen in their boots, leaving muddy marks on the floor.
examples.chinese: 孩子们穿着靴子走过厨房，在地板上留下了泥印。

examples.english: Builders’ sand leaves an orange stain on paths.
examples.chinese: 建筑工人洒落的沙子在小道上留下了橙色的印迹。

centers.english: a mark on someone's skin

examples.english: He had two little marks on his face where his glasses had been.
examples.chinese: 他脸上戴眼镜处有两点小斑痕。

examples.english: She squeezed me so hard, she left a mark on my arm.
examples.chinese: 她捏得我很重，在我手臂上留下了一块印痕。

examples.english: He had a large red pimple on his nose.
examples.chinese: 他鼻子上有个很大的红色脓疱。

examples.english: When she was younger she had lovely skin, except for the occasional spot.
examples.chinese: 她年轻时除了偶尔长丘疹外皮肤很好。

examples.english: I can't go out tonight with this zit on my face!
examples.chinese: 我脸上有这个小脓疱，今晚不能出去了！

examples.english: Call the doctor if you come out in spots or rashes.
examples.chinese: 如果你出丘疹或皮疹就打电话给医生。

examples.english: a youth with a pale pimply face
examples.chinese: 一个脸色苍白、脸上长着疹子的少年

examples.english: She came up in a spotty irritating rash.
examples.chinese: 她出了一脸斑斑点点使人烦恼的皮疹。

examples.english: Sarah had freckles and red hair.
examples.chinese: 萨拉长着雀斑和一头红发。

examples.english: The little boys were freckled and fair-haired.
examples.chinese: 这些小男孩长着雀斑和金发。

examples.english: Her sleeves were rolled up, showing her strong, freckled arms.
examples.chinese: 她的袖子卷起，露出她那强壮的、长有色斑的手臂。

examples.english: He had a scar across his forehead from hitting his head on the bottom of a swimming pool.
examples.chinese: 他曾把头撞到了游泳池池底，额头留有一道伤疤。

examples.english: They say the wound's quite deep, and will probably leave a scar.
examples.chinese: 他们说伤口很深，有可能会留下伤疤。

examples.english: He had black hair and a scarred face.
examples.chinese: 他一头黑发，脸上有伤疤。

examples.english: He was scarred from a bullet during the war.
examples.chinese: 战争中他被子弹击中留下了伤疤。

examples.english: How did you get that bruise on your shoulder?
examples.chinese: 你肩上怎么会有那乌青块的?

examples.english: I banged into the shelf so hard that I got an ugly purple bruise on my hip.
examples.chinese: 我在搁板上重重地撞了一下，臀部被撞出很大一块乌青块。

examples.english: a bruised wrist
examples.chinese: 有瘀伤的手腕

examples.english: He had no idea what was causing the red blotches on his skin.
examples.chinese: 他不明白他皮肤上的红斑是什么引起的。

examples.english: I first noticed the purple blotches on my neck on Thursday.
examples.chinese: 我最早发觉自己脖上有紫斑是在星期四。

examples.english: Her face was all blotchy and her hair was a mess.
examples.chinese: 她脸上全是疹块，头发凌乱。

examples.english: Her skin was perfect -- not a blemish on it.
examples.chinese: 她的皮肤完美无瑕—一点疤痕都没有。

examples.english: The police identified the girl from a birthmark on her leg.
examples.chinese: 警方从腿上的胎记辨认出了那个女孩。

centers.english: a mark made by a particular person, thing, or animal
centers.chinese: 由某人、物或动物留下的印迹

examples.english: There are marks on the tarmac where the car left the road.
examples.chinese: 那辆汽车冲离马路的那段柏油路面上有痕迹。

examples.english: I don't think the tractor came this way - there are no tyre marks in the mud.
examples.chinese: 我想拖拉机不是从这个方向开过来的，泥地里没有轮胎印。

examples.english: You could see the claw marks on his body where the animal had attacked.
examples.chinese: 你可以看见那头动物袭击他时在他身上留下的爪印。

examples.english: He ran into the hallway, leaving wet footprints behind him.
examples.chinese: 他跑进了门厅，身后留下一串湿脚印。

examples.english: The footprints in the yard were too big to be a dog's.
examples.chinese: 院子里的爪印很大，不会是狗留下的。

examples.english: The dog had left muddy paw prints all across the kitchen floor.
examples.chinese: 那只狗在厨房地板上到处都留下了泥爪印。

examples.english: We followed the wheel tracks across the field.
examples.chinese: 我们跟着车辙走过了那片地。

examples.english: The tracks, which looked like a fox's, led directly into the forest.
examples.chinese: 那些爪印，看上去像是狐狸留下来的，径直向树林延伸进去。

examples.english: The police were examining the doors and windows, looking for fingerprints.
examples.chinese: 警察在检查门窗，寻找指纹。

examples.english: Her prints were identified on one of the glasses.
examples.chinese: 在一只玻璃杯上发现了她的指纹。

examples.english: I had my fingerprints taken when I applied for a work permit.
examples.chinese: 我在申请工作许可证时被套取了指纹。
